name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s here!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Did you see? Our 2024 Candidate Recruitment is here! We’re ready to find
the next generation of Justice Democrats to take on the establishment in
2024.

AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee: every single win comes back to
you and your steadfast support for our people-powered movement.

Will you invest in our Candidate Recruitment and help us find our new
Justice Democrats? A $3 donation — or any amount at all —
will go a long way.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123612?refcode=em20221216-26602&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26602%2E1203867%2E3qOivh ]→ Yes, I will make my first
$3 donation to help recruit the next
generation of Justice Democrats!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123620?refcode=em20221216-26602&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26602%2E1203867%2E3qOivh ]→ Yes, and I’ll start a monthly donation to support Justice Democrats!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123612?refcode=em20221216-26602&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26602%2E1203867%2E3qOivh ]Contribute $3

Imagine Congress without the Squad pushing the progressive agenda forward
every year — now think about what it will look like when we send the next
generation of Justice Democrats to join them in 2024.

We need to find those progressive fighters, but we can’t do it without
your help. Our fundraising has dipped this year and we can’t afford to
lose out on these all-important resources for our candidate recruitment.

We’re the only progressive organization out there that recruits
candidates, launches their campaigns, embeds with their staff, and elects
new members of the Squad — and we do it cycle after cycle. But as a
grassroots-powered organization, none of it would be possible without you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123612?refcode=em20221216-26602&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=26602%2E1203867%2E3qOivh ]Peter,
it’s urgent that we can raise funds as
quickly as possible for Candidate Recruitment. Can we count on you to rush
a $3 donation immediately?

Thank you for fighting with us,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=26602%2E1203867%2E3qOivh ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=26602%2E1203867%2E3qOivh ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221216-26602-footer&t=1025&refcode2=26602_1203867_3qOivh&akid=26602%2E1203867%2E3qOivh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=26602%2E1203867%2E3qOivh

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

I’d be lying to you if I said I wasn’t pretty upset about what my team told me.

We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Chuck Schumer will be foaming at the mouth to take a shot at me this month, knowing that I don’t have the resources to fight back. **Now I can take a punch, but I don’t want to take one if I can avoid it.[So, if you’re able and willing to help me out, it’d mean the world to me if you’d rush what you can to support conservative voices in the new year.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlv6nsauh3b1enagc715rbi4job2m9md2qnlmei0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72c1h2bs)**

name: American Briefing
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zorm5lusg77komt6ionvgqg9fnrkj2cnf2igg8ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdoijjat1d16qmg6m2knrl9ml3vn3mc3fbbc5erg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72c1h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztvc2q4uvjbe07u89thje661k8b9f9atkmg36eho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72c1h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zcsabu4avfhcvuilfffrir8de2p8548nfila2c50).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv3j4f5okbsbqo4sc3m7l06flj88if61t5scca28_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7chh6eob0s9g649fg)

subject: Let’s circle up for a second.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Christmas update 2022

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43997%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GDfuKvfhiyTtGKXMqQY1bA&sysid=1)

Folks,

I’m trying to get on the nice list this year...and in a hurry.

The reason? Because I won’t be able to afford any presents otherwise living in Socialist Joe’s America. Heck, I won’t even be able to afford the wrapping paper! You probably feel the same way I do, too, so I’m sorry for beating a dead horse.

body:
There’s one trend behind this crime wave, but it’s not what you think...
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgmsblk32d61chlc3kenhicv0ul3m1skuvgrgg8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72c1h2bs)
---
Friend, I want to share a headline with you today — not because it’s remarkable, but because right now, _it’s sadly unremarkable_.
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7c73uni3h08q5tidk3lh77qe7ttp36aianqvlag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72c1h2bs)
---
**Friend,_this headline is the new normal for the criminal justice system in our country — and it’s exactly why our nation is suffering a massive crime wave._** How did this happen? A network of radical activists and billionaires, including George Soros, quietly poured tens of millions of dollars into local prosecutor races.
---
[**HELP US STOP THEM**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl8a177ienasp5t5a6evcfou5j38gg59ko3pg5uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72c1h2bs)
---
That tidal wave of cash overwhelmed these under-the-radar elections and placed radicals into prominent law enforcement positions.
And, once they got there, they stopped enforcing the parts of the law they didn’t like — and the effect has been dire.
_**At this point, they are not just failing to address rising crime but actually causing it**_** _._ **Letting violent offenders go free, eliminating bail, and treating criminals like victims only leads to more victims of violent crime.
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9gm0ptvkpj4nh1p3vhvarao691v3v761a8qaar0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72c1h2bs)
---
Leftist-controlled cities like San Francisco and Chicago show the terrible, corrosive effect of radical prosecutors. We refuse to let far-left activists destroy our neighborhoods. **At Fair Courts America, we’re standing up to the tens of millions of dollars that deep-pocketed liberal megadonors and woke activists are pouring into these races. ** We make sure voters get the facts so they can elect prosecutors and judges who actually do their jobs — not activists who let criminals walk free. That is the ONLY way to ensure a future with equal justice under the law, as the founders intended. _That’s why Fair Courts America exists. _ **And today, we need YOUR help to keep the streets safe and our justice system free and fair. Will you step up?_[https://secure.winred.com/fair-courts-america/stop-radical-prosecutors](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztmdpurnobe6es9prh2qqtce042i7utiechitiag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72c1h2bs)_** In justice, Andrew Wynne _Executive Director_**Fair Courts America**

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuu4c4hfdilbvo9ts497tejjchi5fj8oq64g0gs0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72cjh2bs)
---
Friend, The holiday season is a joyous time for many. But, sadly, there are American Heroes who will be missing from the festivities this year. Bob Bales, Neftaly Platero, and Calvin Gibbs are three of these Warriors currently behind bars and separated from loved ones.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za78ktcfrvfterg4q3h43p0kuvsdes81nq81iblg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72cjh2bs)
---
**These innocent Warriors were wrongly accused of crimes while serving in the United States’ Armed Forces. **
They were ripped away from their families and forced to endure long trials. _Some are even threatened with LIFE in prison._
---
[**BRING OUR HEROES HOME******](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zipp11sgchjte76elpf1lf857jgsmq21sauajvt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72cjh2bs)
---
These Warriors sacrificed so much for our country and deserve more than sham trials and media scrutiny. That’s why the United American Patriots team is fighting to get them the justice they’re owed. We are doing everything we can to secure the best legal defense teams for their cases and generate more positive public awareness. **But if we’re going to get these Heroes home for the holidays, we need the support of Patriots like you.** **[Can we count on you to make a contribution to our Warrior Fund?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbdkeo4tepj7biqdcgq9kcmflj0fv0sb0gm5vmhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72cjh2bs)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic le
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv3lasmrl8ghfishmecod2f6l805k4fq2fl33krg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72cdh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5jgjean25k60u5m1uu1s9hqdbqrv5hh84pejhog_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72cdh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmkpj1g8a2kq2lrlji88oj0ogo7ulbhf5fskjebg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm2o72cdh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zocpsg8vufp6b2o3cia6in5eao1v7tedvovckfqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm6or2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6oaosf0hq229pkv24p54cmc3utr7hnjjdbts3r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm6or2chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr7m2rk69ngcf7bm41b5iqjlqspnrve3oi252mag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9jm6or2chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zq3jdj1b06nt4eamqncft4ejcitkglgnfoomsn6o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7fs09a33ro5rl7fo5alao6db05pv3j2kpua63t8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7chh6eor3c9i649fg)

---

| | |
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019VmZx77Qr-CF0FrGV_LgNm9V_EP05JcGrcxosilijRcLM5hHrimJ9lCYU-AMSrUseUubOzRlkuGgzNapeu1j9_quon1qqvc-Fn8oWsDhNckbXj3ppmBQIwibR5qTaKojCu0iXPHjYQqUh0NqYshKfTzV0umC7AK4QQwitKz2cYiUvBMDjkjyOHpuWORh6suVmo6rhJElihWubaX4Fr_DtXAX3grTymcM&c=NZIZ72Uktrbk26y8lIEE3NKqENAvow_g2YKZvjBzuKasW70tjl5M0A==&ch=eSIGFs7NHP3JHPEq_5DJICT-XAyGm_fLQsQRDLwp1o11z_Gh6Q17jQ==)
---
| Anyone who drives in the state of New York will be paying more taxes out of their pocket if the recent proposal by the NYS Thruway Authority is passed. Toll prices will be raised by 75% for non-E-ZPass users and 5% for E-ZPass users starting in 2024.
Did you know that New York is already number ONE in the nation for state-local tax burdens? The last thing that thousands of hardworking New Yorkers need is another tax INCREASE on driving.
Make your voice heard by signing Senator Rob Ortt's petition to REJECT any new taxes on driving.
---
---
| As we enter into a new legislative session, know that I'm here to listen and be a strong voice for YOU in Albany. My colleagues and I will continue to fight to make the state we love a safer and more affordable place for all.
\- Rob
---

subject: The Doug Collins Podcast Update – Saturday, December 17, 2022
body:
| [Having trouble viewing this email? Click here to see it in your browser.](http://click1.srnemail.com/ViewMessage.do?m=iyyvbvznz&r=cqpllggpgdpm&s=sjcpmkzzmgcgghzccdblgwmskwwgrkdhwrc&q=1671282000&a=view)

---
---
| |
###
---
| | [ The Friday catch up ](http://click1.srnemail.com/wnvjgsttghwbhhmtbwwydbzhkgbnskkhlsymklwvdzwfnw_bbpqqjjfjlfzypqcplblddd.html)
### _Friday, December 16, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a look at things going on in the world from the Russian prisoner swap to the death of Mississippi State football coach Mike Leach. A great episode to catch up on things happening in the world [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/mbqpndzznjtljjvzlttkclsjmnlbdmmjqdkvmqtycstwbn_bbpqqjjfjlfzypqcplblddd.html)
---|---
| [ Different sides of the Aisle ](http://click1.srnemail.com/inycmdttmrbwrrqtwbbfywzrpmwndpprhdfqphbvyzbgnd_bbpqqjjfjlfzypqcplblddd.html)
### _Wednesday, December 14, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I sit down with Kevin Walling, a Democrat strategist who I regularly debate on FOX news. We have a good conversation on what is going on in DC from our perspectives and lay the ground work for what will be a great back and forth in the months to come. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/atblhpvvhcynccgvnyywmnscrhntprrckpwgrkydmsybtt_bbpqqjjfjlfzypqcplblddd.html)
| [ Behind the Scenes of the greatest tragedy in Congress ](http://click1.srnemail.com/qfddgfjjgcvtccrjtvvbmthcygtpfyycwfbrywvsmhvnph_bbpqqjjfjlfzypqcplblddd.html)
### _Monday, December 12, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a deep dive into what is actually going on with the annual drama around the appropriations process in Washington. I break down what the terms are and what they are not and show why this is the biggest failure each year in Washington! name: Lila Rose
subject: THIS leads to 4x more abortions!
body:
Live Action’s research team recently shared a heartbreaking study exposing Planned Parenthood’s secret to raking billions of

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdhmstuaghb3eojfacgag7vkrmsrrcd0gg8ov4mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ge0oj6cdh2bs)
---
#
Friend of life,

Live Action's research team recently shared a heartbreaking study exposing Planned Parenthood's secret to raking billions of dollars in profit.

The study analyzed young women based on the outcomes of their first pregnancies. The mothers who aborted their first babies had 4x more abortions over their lifetimes.

4x. That's the secret to Planned Parenthood's profitability. They know that if they can convince a woman to have her first baby killed, they will have her on the hook for another abortion.

**[Give now to reach an abortion-minded mom with the truth before it's too late.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl5prn40n3ok30phghev52h91cq3n7bivstsph9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ge0oj6cdh2bs)**

The co-author of the study rightly noted, "A woman's first pregnancy shapes the course of her life." Unless a mother and all those influencing her decision can break out of Big Abortion's sphere of deception by learning the truth, the consequence for her and for our culture at large is devastating.

The good news is that you can reach a young woman with the truth and save her from a life of abortions by giving right now. For a limited time, your gift will be doubled dollar for dollar. LINK

The reason Planned Parenthood's sex-ed propaganda spreads so quickly is that it is more accessible than the pro-life alternatives. Unfortunately, pro-life sex ed has often been outdated, uninteresting, or unavailable, and thus unable to attract the attention of modern teens.

That's why in 2023 we will be releasing sex ed resources that can be used by schools, parents, churches, and community groups to empower young women and men to discover a sexual ethic that leads to more life-long marriages and zero abortions.

We reach more young people online with viral content than any other pro-life organization. That's why we have the unique experience and expertise to craft resources that will go viral instead of sitting unused on the shelf.

Teens will want to see these videos because they will be engaging, interesting, and unforgettable. The overarching message will resonate because it will focus on love and respect, which is what every woman and man desires.

But none of this happens without you.

Your gift right now will enable us to create the first-ever pro-life sexual health curriculum designed to go viral and transform young minds from pro-death to pro-life. And, for a limited time, your gift will be MATCHED by generous donors.

Every dollar reaches 34 more people, so a matched gift of as little as $15 reaches more than 1,000 young people with life-saving TRUTH.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: D.C. jail blocked cancer treatment for Jan. 6 peaceful protester
body:
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7549%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=bataCbDw65lDyprptT2vEA&sysid=1)

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97014%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RxuNCb6enyIAKvIAJorJeA&sysid=1)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications ...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancee, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97025%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sVZonMEt6O4CRoQ7ZHabUA&sysid=1)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97026%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ttxg1goXfogc%2bP1gXXTxeA&sysid=1)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97027%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NUJW6eHlmYW9%2bsWjvzKk2Q&sysid=1)

---

name: American Defense News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zera3cuqs9s4q5t72nip6he79psusnfdpt8vub80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ge0oj6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1a7g1k1cfc15jjm59i15967ncgkra14tu5ofc1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ge0oj6cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc6cd4eh60jukev9i4qbp22jdsar7q2o1dejq0ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ge0oj6cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsoffhl621o2svd933e5n0kqg8bd1es1f6oofsjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ge0oj6cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Pete Sepp
subject: President Biden is threatening the US energy supply with a new tax policy.
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086919:6X0V1GGJN:m:1:3334294963:2D17B8BAF4B60C02D0C03A2D0FDB22A5:r)
Peter,

I'm sorry to send you this message, but President Biden is threatening the US energy supply with a new tax policy.

Biden recently announced his intention to seek congressional approval for a windfall profit tax on domestic oil and gas producers.

But what does that mean for you, Peter?

**_A spike in your energy bill and rising gas prices_. And for folks who depend on oil to heat their homes, even bigger trouble. **

My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). Our mission is to lobby for practical policy wins that improve the lives of taxpayers.

NTU is working with the new Congress to fight against this tax increase. So I've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of November to support our work.

[_**Can I count on you to help us meet this important goal? Click here to send your urgent gift before the month is over >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086919:6X0V1GGJN:m:1:3334294963:2D17B8BAF4B60C02D0C03A2D0FDB22A5:r)

It's outrageous that Biden is proposing this tax increase during an inflationary period. Doesn't he know there's a long history of tax hikes hurting our economy?

From 1980 to 1988, the U.S. implemented a profits tax on U.S. oil producers.

According to a report by the Congressional Research Service, **this tax reduced domestic oil production between 320 million barrels to 1.3 billion barrels. **

**This affected the average citizen due to the increased oil prices, as foreign oil importation shot up. **

We can't know the extent of the impact Biden's proposed windfall tax would have until there are more policy details. But by using the 1980 windfall tax as a guide, we can gain a pretty good understanding.

Overall, the 1980s tax reduced oil production by 8%.

Today, the Energy Information Administration (EIA) estimates that U.S. crude oil production for 2022 averages 11.7 million barrels per day. If President Biden's proposal had a similar impact, it could reduce domestic production by up to _936,000 barrels per day_.

Biden's tax on profits could also hurt production of diesel fuel, which is already being squeezed. That means the cost of shipping many goods goes up ... and you pay the price.

[_**That 's why the NTU is working to STOP this proposed tax increase before it affects your wallet. Can you join the fight today? Click here to send a gift of any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086919:6X0V1GGJN:m:1:3334294963:2D17B8BAF4B60C02D0C03A2D0FDB22A5:r)

The Biden administration has worked to curtail domestic oil production since entering office in 2020.

Their agenda has included:
* An attempt to impose a moratorium on new oil and gas leases on federal land
* Canceling the Keystone XL oil pipeline project from Canada into the U.S.
* Halting oil drilling in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge
* And calling for a gas tax holiday that would accelerate consumer demand for gas without increasing supply. Sure, temporary tax relief sounds great, but it's no substitute for affordable gas over the long run.

_**President Biden 's threat to tax oil producers and ultimately consumers is the last thing we need as we head into a winter where affordable, plentiful energy will be vital for many parts of the country. **_

That's why it's so imperative for NTU to fight this windfall tax proposal NOW before the winter cold really sets in.

Can you help us reach our goal of raising $25,000 by the end of November?
[_**Donate $25 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086918:6X0V1GGJN:m:1:3334294963:2D17B8BAF4B60C02D0C03A2D0FDB22A5:r)

[_**Donate $50 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086916:6X0V1GGJN:m:1:3334294963:2D17B8BAF4B60C02D0C03A2D0FDB22A5:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086915:6X0V1GGJN:m:1:3334294963:2D17B8BAF4B60C02D0C03A2D0FDB22A5:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086914:6X0V1GGJN:m:1:3334294963:2D17B8BAF4B60C02D0C03A2D0FDB22A5:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086913:6X0V1GGJN:m:1:3334294963:2D17B8BAF4B60C02D0C03A2D0FDB22A5:r)

Our mission is to lobby for practical policy wins that improve the lives of taxpayers. NTU is working with the new Congress to fight against this tax increase. So I've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of November to support our work. It's outrageous that Biden is proposing this tax increase during an inflationary period. Doesn't he know there's a long history of tax hikes hurting our economy? From 1980 to 1988, the U.S. implemented a profits tax on U.S. oil producers. According to a report by the Congressional Research Service, this tax reduced domestic oil production between 320 million barrels to 1.3 billion barrels. This affected the average citizen due to the increased oil prices, as foreign oil importation shot up. We can't know the extent of the impact Biden's proposed windfall tax would have until there are more policy details. But by using the 1980 windfall tax as a guide, we can gain a pretty good understanding. Overall, the 1980s tax reduced oil production by 8%. Today, the Energy Information Administration (EIA) estimates that U.S. crude oil production for 2022 averages 11.7 million barrels per day. If President Biden's proposal had a similar impact, it could reduce domestic production by up to 936,000 barrels per day. Biden's tax on profits could also hurt production of diesel fuel, which is already being squeezed. That means the cost of shipping many goods goes up ... and you pay the price. The Biden administration has worked to curtail domestic oil production since entering office in 2020. Their agenda has included: An attempt to impose a moratorium on new oil and gas leases on federal land Canceling the Keystone XL oil pipeline project from Canada into the U.S. Halting oil drilling in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge And calling for a gas tax holiday that would accelerate consumer demand for gas without increasing supply. Sure, temporary tax relief sounds great, but it's no substitute for affordable gas over the long run. President Biden 's threat to tax oil producers and ultimately consumers is the last thing we need as we head into a winter where affordable, plentiful energy will be vital for many parts of the country. That's why it's so imperative for NTU to fight this windfall tax proposal NOW before the winter cold really sets in. Can you help us reach our goal of raising $25,000 by the end of November? Thank you, Pete Sepp President National Taxpayers Union NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels. # #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1lri29un5dlifgf2j73jpetanj2l24msj06ua5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geco76cph2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1jaju7ee0dic3i1ubs9n53s8gq9f3pfsdqtqrv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geco76cph2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc6uuucpbvl1o1a3msv8j7masq4vad6ttf04jp28_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geco76cph2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvqru6c559raf2qishjtt66ekbu08c7i4aejjr5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geco76cph2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl7kk5lcgma6glo7pfvfllml3miuv35p7evee1m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geco76cph2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu9un950s2ur1dilosspphrqfc8k9us81tejp2do_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geco76cph2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt3qb7f1khm7nvscsshishua2ak4rvabh6fv4blo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geco76cph2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zspltknjs8vg5otv9pvrriq8122sr0q6i03c7dgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geco76cph2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.

| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.

---|---

Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."

And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. These Survival Food Kits Are Famous for Selling Out... Now They're Back in Stock! These best-selling kits are back in stock... and you'll get loaded up with when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... FREE Bonus #2: You'll get a Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF your next purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now]() Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. First, you get their no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food anytime in the next 25 years and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. [[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now]() You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now]() To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition to Congress: Hold corporations accountable for price gouging
body:
Signature needed
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbeae513-04a5-425b-ad76-0d85a0fbdfbd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, [**Sign the petition: Congress must pass legislation that takes action against corporate greed and price gouging.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9c105ca-2ec2-4a4f-8b55-0aa06f7c9c0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Corporate America would like you to believe that gas prices and other external obstacles continue to drive inflation. **A major driving force is corporate greed**. Companies are using inflation as a pretext to jack up consumer prices while raking in record-high profits. Corporate price gouging is a significant problem affecting Americans everywhere. Corporate profits have reached an all-time high of $2 trillion thanks to price hikes made possible due to dwindling industry competition. Skyrocketing food prices at grocery stores and restaurants have taken a massive toll on working families' pockets. Food giants such as ConAgra, Pepsico, Coca-Cola, Chipotle Foods, and many others are shamelessly hiking prices up to 15% from last year--all while banking huge profits.
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf47afa37-d9e6-4562-9edd-42306c4f622c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | **Congress must crack down on unchecked corporate greed.** Sen. Bernie Sanders introduced the [Ending Corporate Greed Act](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4aba509-3e61-4ab8-95eb-470112777a91/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), which specifically aims to end corporate price gouging. Similarly, Rep. Katie Porter introduced [legislation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6160f2b0-bfc5-4c32-b855-e5e248a11c07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that would "strengthen accountability for big corporations that engage in coordinated price hikes" by closing loopholes companies exploit to avoid antitrust liability. Congress must pass these bills to rein in price gouging and relieve the current financial pressure consumers face. [**Sign the petition: Congress must pass legislation that takes action against corporate greed and price gouging.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf3cc017-4d39-4201-9799-fdaf731eb302/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fd2c562-4805-40f9-a0a3-67f3c17c4b56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you for being in this fight with us, Peter. Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5, $10, or $25 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend the Biden agenda, and important progressive causes.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99d12840-939a-43bb-b231-b1a269a03e88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/petitionholdcorporationsaccountableforpricegouging-k?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta694862f-1746-4a12-9b93-57ad1d1d39d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=921ea87f-7dce-4ec0-9fd6-5c2118e22766&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=921ea87f-7dce-4ec0-9fd6-5c2118e22766&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Team James
subject: FWD: bringing this back to the top of your inbox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Peter, sorry for the bump, but we had to make sure you saw Letitia James’ 2023 Priorities Survey.

Last week, AG James called on this powerful community to help guide her work in the new year — and the initial response to the survey was overwhelming. **That’s why we’ve decided to re-open the survey to give you another chance to make your voice heard — but it will only remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. **

Peter, we’re counting on your responses to help determine what the AG should prioritize in the new year. So please:

**Will you take 60 seconds now to respond to Letitia James’ 2023 Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the survey:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-2022-post-elections-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56075589/383791277/667321105?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk926-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJiM2YxZi0xMzdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXbVs4Fv0HwKgRQezhgKD_Whc4pK6eXuX9bE7aS_0Ic=&emci=f4d47bf9-3f7b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=edbb3f1f-137e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)**

Thank you for your help!

Team James
---
\------- Forwarded message -------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Mon, December 12, 2022
Subject: Peter, what are your priorities heading into the new year?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56075590/383791299/265476937?code=jtk926-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJiM2YxZi0xMzdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXbVs4Fv0HwKgRQezhgKD_Whc4pK6eXuX9bE7aS_0Ic=)

[**Take my 2023 Priorities Survey!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56075591/383791300/667321105?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk926-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJiM2YxZi0xMzdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXbVs4Fv0HwKgRQezhgKD_Whc4pK6eXuX9bE7aS_0Ic=&emci=f4d47bf9-3f7b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=edbb3f1f-137e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56075593/383791301/667321105?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk926-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJiM2YxZi0xMzdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXbVs4Fv0HwKgRQezhgKD_Whc4pK6eXuX9bE7aS_0Ic=&emci=f4d47bf9-3f7b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=edbb3f1f-137e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, as we close the books on another year, [**I wanted to take a moment to ask you about your top priorities and concerns for 2023.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56075594/383791305/667321105?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk926-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJiM2YxZi0xMzdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXbVs4Fv0HwKgRQezhgKD_Whc4pK6eXuX9bE7aS_0Ic=&emci=f4d47bf9-3f7b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=edbb3f1f-137e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504) Here’s why your response is so important:

**I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.** I was born and raised in a working-class family in Brooklyn. I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were directly affecting my family and me.

**In short, I know what it is like to feel voiceless.****** That’s why, when we made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman ever to serve in statewide office in New York, I vowed to _always_ provide New Yorkers with a platform to voice their concerns. **And now that I’ve been elected to another term, I’m reaffirming this vow to you today, Peter.

[That’s why I created this quick survey for you – so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most. So please, will you take my 2023 Priorities Survey right now? I want to get 1,000 responses by midnight!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56075595/383791306/667321105?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk926-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJiM2YxZi0xMzdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXbVs4Fv0HwKgRQezhgKD_Whc4pK6eXuX9bE7aS_0Ic=&emci=f4d47bf9-3f7b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=edbb3f1f-137e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56075597/383791307/667321105?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk926-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJiM2YxZi0xMzdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bXbVs4Fv0HwKgRQezhgKD_Whc4pK6eXuX9bE7aS_0Ic=&emci=f4d47bf9-3f7b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=edbb3f1f-137e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=25369504)
---
Your response will help me hone in on the issues that _actually_ matter to everyday, working New Yorkers in the new year. And, now that we’ve held our Democratic Senate majority but lost the majority in the House, it’s critical that I know what fights to prioritize at the state level as we enter into this new political landscape.

**That’s why I’m looking for 1,000 fearless fighters to step up now and complete my survey before midnight, but I’m still missing your response, Peter. I vow to fight relentlessly for every New Yorker – from Manhattan to Niagara Falls to Watertown – but I can only do that with your help. So please: **

[**Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with my team? clean_body: Peter, sorry for the bump, but we had to make sure you saw Letitia James’ 2023 Priorities Survey. Last week, AG James called on this powerful community to help guide her work in the new year — and the initial response to the survey was overwhelming. That’s why we’ve decided to re-open the survey to give you another chance to make your voice heard — but it will only remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. Peter, we’re counting on your responses to help determine what the AG should prioritize in the new year. So please: Will you take 60 seconds now to respond to Letitia James’ 2023 Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the survey: Thank you for your help! Team James \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Letitia James Date: Mon, December 12, 2022 Subject: Peter, what are your priorities heading into the new year? | | | = | | Peter, as we close the books on another year, Here’s why your response is so important: I didn’t grow up with power or privilege. I was born and raised in a working-class family in Brooklyn. I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were directly affecting my family and me. In short, I know what it is like to feel voiceless.** That’s why, when we made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman ever to serve in statewide office in New York, I vowed to always provide New Yorkers with a platform to voice their concerns. And now that I’ve been elected to another term, I’m reaffirming this vow to you today, Peter. | | Your response will help me hone in on the issues that actually matter to everyday, working New Yorkers in the new year. And, now that we’ve held our Democratic Senate majority but lost the majority in the House, it’s critical that I know what fights to prioritize at the state level as we enter into this new political landscape. That’s why I’m looking for 1,000 fearless fighters to step up now and complete my survey before midnight, but I’m still missing your response, Peter. I vow to fight relentlessly for every New Yorker – from Manhattan to Niagara Falls to Watertown – but I can only do that with your help. So please: ** | | Thank you for helping me help you. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY
