name: Brent Bozell
subject: Elon Musk bought a crime scene
body:
Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger — and I believe he may be right.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeevu80u6tjcr1thums7rtpgqqs2t30je4d7ft0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)
Friend,

Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger -- and I believe he may be right.

Elon recently revealed to the world that a cabal of government and private sector elites are working in unison to influence the elections.

He didn't buy a social media company. He bought a crime scene showing corruption and election interference at the deepest levels of government and society.

This is just one example of the unified assault that the government and corporate elites are perpetuating on the American republic through **Big Tech censorship, radical leftwing propagandists in the media, and deep state agents in our government. **

And this is what the Media Research Center (MRC) has been revealing to the public, even before Elon Musk.

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

And we're going to war against the media to hold them accountable and expose their Deep State corruption.

[_**MRC is raising $15,000 before the New Year, and I need your help. Can you donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today? Click here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zldijdb6rs2n3r6vibkumrnb03n0gvju5gnd5jeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)

Now Elon is working to stop this, taking steps like firing Twitter's former deputy general counsel James Bake for suppression of information:
* Elon promised a blitz of internal Twitter documents -- the **Twitter Files** -- starting with the 2020 decision to block users from sharing coverage of Hunter Biden's leaked laptop files.

* Journalist Matt Taibbi shared that Baker had "vetted" the first installment of the **Twitter File** s, then **delayed** the release of the second installment in defiance of Elon's plan.

* Elon found that Baker's "explanation was . . . unconvincing" and promptly fired Baker.

Elon's life is at risk because he is exposing the Deep State Media -- so you and I can prepare for the battle for America's freedom. But this also shows the deep state agents are embedded in American corporations.

[_**Can you send your urgent donation to MRC and help us defeat Big Tech censors? Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zst4h72kadlq5ht4uv3tmtu4ul27udro2udi3j30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)

How does the Media Research Center expose the left-wing media?

MRC's Newsbuster has a Free Speech division that is solely dedicated to exposing Big Tech censorship. Through MRC's CensorTrack, we have recorded 4,769 instances of Big Tech censorship.

**Our CensorTrack has been used in high profile court cases against the Biden admin. **

MRC has DESTROYED the Media's reputation, but we still have a long way to go.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Friend, it is no exaggeration to say that the fight against the Deep State Media corruption is a fight for America itself. Can you join MRC and help us reach our goal of $15,000 this month?

**Click below to donate.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgqqksflti5m23csr1j9aagurvaudsngvijmanr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6i749qo3sku2fa96fhrvh8fa9m3qpmdm40h6690_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh05hp4ug2uuhn7mkv9n45lrum863ee8namstocg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsthobdcp11nmcuuetsct3d6h3q6mtgt2jumnqio_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zelll1or4ffaov74tset9ts7rb2pvrca36djask0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z83crtifh1mdocjo777dsis8lij0m404cig1lfag_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z05ng4hcbb2vlkglrs9fr6vc5e5jpf8i1sbud0do_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor0cth2bs)

name: American Update
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0294%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0STqWuNlTMDdOQGVwBgTgQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43901%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fNOmZCQGIR7fOcnmKbsYiA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43902%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k4pFL3bEy3GPcTHtjV%2bDEA&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43903%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V7Yjfy9hPA72VzbQ9pF%2fjQ&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0294%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0STqWuNlTMDdOQGVwBgTgQ&sysid=1)

name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znpq4u4uvk3n9i4bkh186dg2fab8p6psc1cbmg1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor2c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u3ge9o746soe0ptmc5ob2or2c5qj1ohkm5qjctbkmgrm5d3j65gbapdkcsrr8o77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphheipm2ptnclj32c5jc1jr1db5e8iv0)

*Sponsored Message*
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0llgnv7olgkj91odrqaoo2plvrb09i1jm38i868_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor2c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zreccfitvgoaoat057vtpnmmiokd5emhv2f51ip0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor2c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmbk570l1jnie462l34uai3hgtcgbldiapjab42o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor2c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztr2dcfk8b0rkgvj4isa2esk96rbmk6c7b0mq74g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geaor2c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Action News
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqb6t9rveemoa58cbq74848v9dgdpfvtusuhgj3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geeob1cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0rnrflk8uc5qc5p79s8ph21qk9jqp8m7p0usea8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geeob1cph2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqkaj0t7of9krnv20bg2cvmjoc6cp09ccqc4f1jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geeob1cph2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjsq5lmh4lpbv0n69b3ic36vpv7nvcfjsrdubr90_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geeob4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3o96l3ochd5lfac7okra7ib10p87t2g4a1ofccg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geeob4cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvbqf80beuoqd2jjbdc2pikvedajvgtcrog6kg20_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geeob4cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zau4b3e58qiakrqjiqf6fik1m0oun6arm1bn439g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geeob6chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3hoi03ed55vmvdap543cv6dtbo6r581gm3e9db0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geeob6chh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zid45fusvam9aofc2qm9bar8b6brnihnkq60vf60_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9geeob6chh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Emilia Sykes HQ
subject: Our first major test since Election Day…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Peter, at the end of the month, our team will face our first public fundraising deadline since Election Day. That’s only two weeks away. This will be the first major test of our campaign since our historic victory in November, so it is critical that we have a strong showing and prove that we can keep OH-13 blue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56083268/383821704/-1743402759?refcode=em_fr_2022.12.17_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWU3OTUxYy0yMDdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nI-WRwMpBYgFllKfJT99Jgksszhp7rBh2pgUfwXYtmg=)
Peter,

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3b82e3fa368424ab1835f6bd09fb60f&_e=5GE6Lzw4ouxrVIHvJ1MsEkkeGHGpEm9NsNrV1LDwj2V7r5NMorE9u1eS26yxd5Mpwp6lqQ8Hx7sGzz4OGOfctHELOEaxUpKVRa1yomPaXw5M2YJqU6_6GuHnXH4bxcfIcoRYhY6gF1w5dEqgiBettFRIin0bYuGb97FrfwRqqhQDSULlpH9ts3q-xSwNHagi9lLoKfG94mG_R1Q3Sh-RNI9HJ9ukLo52gyULBdyn-SiQjuPbm7DH6u5iFTT8klpuTJVrVcRxbC1nr4ckOYu1YKyyu9LqSTN04E5uv9cEv1fsw-nGz0JI4Pg6kpsW2Vu6-qjQ0nzabUGdHUuLicrL8-3AoEHv-3HlxfQ5R_ygklnUKPVhfhkyfxqKile5EToQekns4SH8Whk131zAMd0zng%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3b82e3fa368424ab1835f6bd09fb60f&_e=5GE6Lzw4ouxrVIHvJ1MsEkkeGHGpEm9NsNrV1LDwj2V7r5NMorE9u1eS26yxd5Mpwp6lqQ8Hx7sGzz4OGOfctHELOEaxUpKVRa1yomPaXw5M2YJqU6_6GuHnXH4bxcfIcoRYhY6gF1w5dEqgiBettFRIin0bYuGb97FrfwRqqhQDSULlpH9ts3q-xSwNHagi9lLoKfG94mG_R1Q3Sh-RNI9HJ9ukLo52gyULBdyn-SjjCzX2Y7NXaOiuj-BehhB_VOJJnKKSD2Pjgc9Caq_YpHQNJHLrbMozPTr70GGkhsnBWCBj8e2UVlq3L-uyN06JxmAlIR6u87AcL6YI8vw4BdxOGQ_G5LsIs7jHrlw6MAuD2CivTSQV2AVqQnDuOQd-WHpTJfXBgxQb8P8zw8oCaw%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3b82e3fa368424ab1835f6bd09fb60f&_e=5GE6Lzw4ouxrVIHvJ1MsEkkeGHGpEm9NsNrV1LDwj2V7r5NMorE9u1eS26yxd5Mpwp6lqQ8Hx7sGzz4OGOfctHELOEaxUpKVRa1yomPaXw5M2YJqU6_6GuHnXH4bxcfIcoRYhY6gF1w5dEqgiBettFRIin0bYuGb97FrfwRqqhQDSULlpH9ts3q-xSwNHagi9lLoKfG94mG_R1Q3Sh-RNI9HJ9ukLo52gyULBdyn-ShLDIcScyWPERFotckPqNatTMhOL0iXufZMJzoUgIy2wwocl6trb4ET9-gEDSxi3GM0ZAOP2Dlys0KjGFs9yXshLE_6zS4BoDE8LLSRPppZ2ZxWEzjvu-6uAM4yNseRlPRMrS1b37flO5c_B4osWFYwsYCSmHiWaoRaA_U0yQ_nrQ%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=b3b82e3fa368424ab1835f6bd09fb60f&_t=7rAi742DF7e5uaN3BrO33RTFpxQpBHEkyRxGBVRa6HmG7Q3yoasXJeeVc4hNaxIH3-zjKxed9WEP2Qbwr65OT60VHJPpTZVPOzwaN8XDIRBm_n4gdGAuxQEnAGJsmBxSnvqO3GK0_Ec0Ojw5WGE4M_Eps1vjsxCvlUsYx9oLCjQ%3D)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dabe2908ff06493797c3e344cadeb972&_e=zdnpUsiwf5xRDnv3u0CH3KW4MXgt5B3WpHFgxVVVJ7ofPO9t7E5AZeCluvJ7XyEAPCy1PVz1lHC8JOGHc9fjF0kxvC4IMa3wqidOrwd1RIE4y88mAS0dkMHsY4kiRb0NVI3KWkIJKrzSDjWczjmXGS5f__fJYz3g-mQcoJ8LZ7EkQfYrPJgFlfucAZ3scKVg8MSQQyiumlH1X5xg_t8QRyK0YhJszwecLO1KAZjEgYM3DasNvBHTuZ_S6XrW2v1shiTIAXga1gEvOyMGziPLUfE3GyxPTJ0oZQP8j2Rz8mAIibQNCrnzOh8cutj-brnD9mST19UIYdFBf8NN5jzr_R1NziVr7MlQt4CqpOL69IIZwBQN_KvE02rGhIchVHOUcdIVgdSwC1iS4xCGFzRa4g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dabe2908ff06493797c3e344cadeb972&_e=zdnpUsiwf5xRDnv3u0CH3KW4MXgt5B3WpHFgxVVVJ7ofPO9t7E5AZeCluvJ7XyEAPCy1PVz1lHC8JOGHc9fjF0kxvC4IMa3wqidOrwd1RIE4y88mAS0dkMHsY4kiRb0NVI3KWkIJKrzSDjWczjmXGS5f__fJYz3g-mQcoJ8LZ7EkQfYrPJgFlfucAZ3scKVg8MSQQyiumlH1X5xg_t8QRyK0YhJszwecLO1KAZjEgYM3DasNvBHTuZ_S6XrW2v1s3kldw9ts6-Hlu9yZi7-wQt1GTvS93-8oTvgYAuPoY4crMOiFLPRJ0c-2_hPddkRmXY9qkhnKArHCAdFClRQfM1wTNwf-YvHg_pcXIwujLaNB6tnyVzYtL67KonhoBI8HUXGYG1vdSjEYHlK8c_bFVw%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dabe2908ff06493797c3e344cadeb972&_e=zdnpUsiwf5xRDnv3u0CH3KW4MXgt5B3WpHFgxVVVJ7ofPO9t7E5AZeCluvJ7XyEAPCy1PVz1lHC8JOGHc9fjF0kxvC4IMa3wqidOrwd1RIE4y88mAS0dkMHsY4kiRb0NVI3KWkIJKrzSDjWczjmXGS5f__fJYz3g-mQcoJ8LZ7EkQfYrPJgFlfucAZ3scKVg8MSQQyiumlH1X5xg_t8QRyK0YhJszwecLO1KAZjEgYM3DasNvBHTuZ_S6XrW2v1sEqstvuXcl1fJztR9UqsYfLQbZePLyAKvNZDLm0c9MhNp36ZADQt3-QPs90oh7fFli10HsF0fDDLkBHbAhfspD8yG8zGBzRNIbN5ejkdV7gM_rD9ebNsBfbRv5-rkwNFq91gurayi__uLUQGda2eHnA%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Dear Peter,

The House just passed a resolution to keep the federal government running until Dec. 23 in the hope of passing a massive budget bill by then.

Of course, I, and most Republicans, voted against this unconstitutional assault on the American economy.

But despite the official House Republican position to oppose the bill, nine RINOs supported the package.

_Seven of those RINOs are also lame-duck members who won't even be back next year_!

Even worse, now the effort moves to the Senate, where Mitch McConnell says Senate Republicans are ready to pass a full-year budget bill next week.

Peter, together you and I worked and sacrificed and took back control of the House!

But lame-duck RINOs in Congress are working to destroy all we gained.

**But I will not sit by and watch it happen; I know you are with me!**

name: Veronica Escobar
subject: Let’s talk about the border, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/VE_Logo_Web.png]
Friend,

Our immigration challenges are complicated, and with the spin from far-right media, it’s important that we set the record straight. Starting right here in El Paso.

Here are the answers to a few of the most common immigration questions:

1) Why are so many people crossing the border?

Mass migration is being fueled by many issues – climate change, famine, destabilized countries, crime, lack of opportunity, and more.

For many in these situations, their only pathway to seek asylum is to journey thousands of miles to our nation’s border and present themselves for asylum.

2) But isn’t crossing like that illegal?

Seeking asylum is 100% legal and protected by US law. Asylum seekers must be in the U.S. or at a port of entry to request the opportunity to apply for asylum.

In the past, people were able to apply for asylum at the U.S. Embassies in their home country. This was known as in-country asylum processing. The Trump Administration ended this practice, contributing to the numbers we see at the border today.

3) Why don’t they just “do it the right way” or “get in line” like other people?

For many, there is no “line” to get into. Pathways to citizenship have continued to shrink over the last 40 years. Many “lines” that existed for previous generations simply do not exist today. This is due in part by Congress’ failure to pass immigration reform for decades. And it results in people seeking asylum as their only hope for citizenship.

4) How did it get to this point?

With decades of inaction from Congress. The last big immigration reform bill was passed nearly 40 years ago. And although Democrats have tried to pass meaningful reform since then, Republicans have blocked it. It’s not surprising that the policies of 40 years ago don’t address today’s challenges. Until we pass bipartisan, modernized immigration reform, we’ll continue to see challenges like this.

5) Can’t we simply “close the border”?

As mentioned above, seeking asylum is a human right protected by U.S. law. And pathways to citizenship are already minimal. It’s clear that deterrence tactics like Title 42, building a wall, hateful rhetoric, children in cages, family separation, and simply “saying no” are not effective in preventing people from fleeing for their lives . Which is why, even under Donald Trump, people still continued to come to our country.

6) Well, our country can’t afford to let these people in!

Research proves that immigrants help grow our GDP and improve our global competitiveness among other countries like China and Russia. Simply put, we need immigrants in our workforce because they make our country stronger. And our nation’s population is not growing adequately to fuel economic competitiveness and ease our labor shortage.

7) How are cities like El Paso handling these migrants?

The City and the County are working to establish programs that help asylum seekers move from the border to the location of their sponsor, who will be responsible for them until their asylum case is adjudicated.

I’ve worked with the Biden Administration and federal agencies to secure federal funding so the money needed to address this humanitarian crisis doesn’t detract from local funds.

Here’s the federal funding I’ve secured so far:

For the County of El Paso:

*
$6
million
in
advanced
funding
for
a
migrant
processing
center.
*
$1.38
million
for
January-March
of
2023
operations.

For the City of El Paso:

*
Full
reimbursements
of
Q1
and
Q2
expenses.
*
More
than
$3.75
million
in
Q3
reimbursements
(more
pending).
*
$6
million
in
funding
for
Q4
of
2022.

8) What’s the solution here?

Comprehensive and modernized immigration reform. Here’s what that looks like:

1.
Addressing
the
root
causes
of
migration.
We
can’t
expect
to
see
a
different
scenario
at
our
borders
if
we’re
not
addressing
why
people
are
coming.
We
must
work
together
with
other
countries
for
better
solutions.
2.
Address
immigration
as
a
comprehensive
issue,
not
SOLELY
a
border
response.
3.
Increase
legal
pathways
to
citizenship.
4.
Reinstate
in-country
asylum
processing.
5.
Expand
work
visas.
6.
Protect
Dreamers.
7.
Civilianize
processing
to
make
sure
our
border
agents
are
in
the
field,
not
doing
paperwork.
8.
Modernize
our
processing
systems
with
better
and
more
efficient
technology.

The takeaway:

We need bipartisan support from Congress to pass the first big immigration bill in nearly 4 decades. Those solutions can be both humane and effective. We don’t have to sacrifice our values to build a better system. Immigration is more than solely a border response. And finally, passing immigration reform is not only urgent, it will greatly benefit our economy.

I’m hopeful that we can find lasting solutions. And I’m willing to work with anyone in Congress who is ready to modernize our practices with efficiency and humanity. Call your Senators and other representatives and urge them to support bipartisan immigration reform.

- Veronica
Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. That's put a target on her back from Trump supporters who are preparing to spend millions to end her leadership. Can we count on you to stand with Veronica?

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7ibesuu4bnt3juj5rri4l914gm6thjqcstt8l60_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie4o71c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8gd6dp7k043t74fhka1be6o273bbhkgq8bcpad8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie4o71c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu8rajlsfjj4r66lqgr8ljdkfogu3klqha746nc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie4o71c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46d0d0ef29eb4311ab5a1c57eccab602&_e=NubFiYpwlDPkymb2xQ_60Ov_cOsX2ENfTDyWxqsA-PbhaIxVQgXcg5JmnPaywnr7_uebOHM36ZSSo_7qA6pnOfORMJTi2yelfDcksErgAzbpWFodpchkomKokTT1hPKkWGdCzHylBd4V7OjBdJ3EMJo2LK13ggD_r858ww1KokKS6btG67nQeDPLaErb8hnPbwIGZnwhqcIq62nl28nJ4xbuRZYleF5Uxt6vLnfYKCSEgJ6LyayBoifGSuA6PFK7VozIsFXt4mmR32KmDDETpeEV56-R4_3LPNnw1KczenUkgUId-TTHs2M4kOkzMjXoJn-myKC4n9kQlVG4OCBmZNzrxBEiptOLD1xoWM2mwd1Jgc3H-ynw6ZGRVVObOy6z)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46d0d0ef29eb4311ab5a1c57eccab602&_e=NubFiYpwlDPkymb2xQ_60Ov_cOsX2ENfTDyWxqsA-PbhaIxVQgXcg5JmnPaywnr7_uebOHM36ZSSo_7qA6pnOfORMJTi2yelfDcksErgAzbpWFodpchkomKokTT1hPKkWGdCzHylBd4V7OjBdJ3EMJo2LK13ggD_r858ww1KokKS6btG67nQeDPLaErb8hnPbwIGZnwhqcIq62nl28nJ4xbuRZYleF5Uxt6vLnfYKCTj_-fB_Zdd31uqylhzOkEoShKLmUxhh_vtVW_eb5q9TjbsEuUucnG-Dt--v-pDVI1q3phvNJkoTuGXE6fM0sPxgQSS3pGbgkgTPHgfIuguE5O024Em3EEAjHPW5GaR-3CVAU4biaixHrWAyX37Qm3j)
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46d0d0ef29eb4311ab5a1c57eccab602&_e=NubFiYpwlDPkymb2xQ_60Ov_cOsX2ENfTDyWxqsA-PbhaIxVQgXcg5JmnPaywnr7_uebOHM36ZSSo_7qA6pnOfORMJTi2yelfDcksErgAzbpWFodpchkomKokTT1hPKkWGdCzHylBd4V7OjBdJ3EMJo2LK13ggD_r858ww1KokKS6btG67nQeDPLaErb8hnPbwIGZnwhqcIq62nl28nJ4xbuRZYleF5Uxt6vLnfYKCQUY5pYhekM41BIZSHNc3lfrayhqYJ4TDgOTgZBnKXDF9-Q8pyYiN7o8OTVBN7rGmDjT-V15GKv4-tmfrL1_Yqfm4jXgVO-gTLT1qmkxgZrKoJBTRF6Ic5UPyIb7y4oz-4q5lNG-udoJ_PAx6Do0SGL)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46d0d0ef29eb4311ab5a1c57eccab602&_e=NubFiYpwlDPkymb2xQ_60Ov_cOsX2ENfTDyWxqsA-PbhaIxVQgXcg5JmnPaywnr7_uebOHM36ZSSo_7qA6pnOfORMJTi2yelfDcksErgAzbpWFodpchkomKokTT1hPKkWGdCzHylBd4V7OjBdJ3EMJo2LK13ggD_r858ww1KokKS6btG67nQeDPLaErb8hnPbwIGZnwhqcIq62nl28nJ4xbuRZYleF5Uxt6vLnfYKCT_3K7gI_87gUkhrnBNVDouFHFatWds4FRNtd--DLV9mr4E2AIgtn38xIVkSTvBpw2kI4xI3eFFfEeuebKddMslePS9eabSHCHIBXlqK9Rd9DvIepqQEU7V2PAaMLRA71lCJ_SGtSp8UOedEh2RKj9s) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8qp17fvf149g1o2e77r5bqlq09i4kqad2s8crfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze9775qncidflhmsivrsqsgmfcd2bt7vgt2mbmfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5j0ij9u6e1h4enoa1tnlo90q0l7rm57r93suo30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z65o41bb9f9a8hc98n9c4nlqhgke23e7v6mgptfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8nktmpplit5201cseu82kluscif496ss75vdq58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfoa7vh2kkcpmfunthgasgf4vtoeksm6v4v8eh0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkrriqpgd7gpfckfetsthqiqijdkrq0imeso3qv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4jlp1751e27j5f75qv3mjmmn1vvb7ku9qdcfmdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv4mftebf4g13ocmgoq6sghkrut0js3o2fsj458g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z08he0fo4847alru3b3r90da1340vm1k6uub2hkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh6mfdr51asq3skvjkk9ug3kfmah74s262cj8bdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z13p3mg61pb8porb0uo5kj6kkj3g96bs8900670g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8crlv7f7ddtdir9k4lfjjkf2f6hhsl0u7mgqjeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znoeh2n49o0lhhtfhtatdnfkkldg33nraimecs5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsp3fngr4g5ooj4oruk6bjsvn6q99u40o7k4p6j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znrad2tl9fd59ocl1jsa7u3nk5sd2gp8s3fk1qn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqq3bnepufr2ud6olqvadu5i84j8filhio2drrn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrbevlr7brn223ovbkstr1uc543ukis01tnu4hf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zj9ksuhjnavkklqkunn3mk6u1k9jak2t33me9ddo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8r7ii8kr5o95lrdvqddu6pdv8d1rog0c543rrno_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0200%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=38GBZ9kRyf0lUG5CyhS8Mw&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43916%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8Zl%2fkLp97ESmJUFuPIeNag&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43917%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SeYiwU%2buyRkNdcx%2fu0cU0w&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43918%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ww04CvQ2z%2fm80L0gpf%2braw&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43919%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kyWGwU0E7p49DFqPrRgfJw&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43910%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KtfRURkYxjeRcZxsfBlnOA&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43911%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lUChrWWrWuey1s4U2U1%2beQ&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43912%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vKKW4c6H8o3ZhJF8NMv1uA&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43913%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ns7WJj9rvk%2bWeajikIC5qw&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43914%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V76zpg4Klnha%2bWCKssEqyg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43925%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QNnZ1aaYKQD4cuoXIVD2RQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43926%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rcmVKFOm9ZFJ25h3y1vHgg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43927%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LN%2bg1%2bVZY0k54JUolFwypQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43928%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RUN9pUvguZXbzxOuCWteHA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43929%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0y3Iutbc9IlCMltdbPguWw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43920%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1rO83rFZtFV9e6gQD9i%2bAw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43921%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EKn7aCMAUmcO02T7gXksAg&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens

BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfqeasvmprvbu5gbjc5mmoadch0rgr3136hl5uu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf4jm7p6fm74cusouhnd5gt19vjc396ar9pv1qkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd17d65dfehmp5vecso54r2kdurgviuaphl7bobo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlaqf8e5knv84qjijh9g6secq9bhim6pjjhduj9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhesclgco5keughc5pulfp140as7nb6meggomv8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbkkpp5qvbad7iissuqn7vo5pdu2vk71kpmc5ar0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znl8mi280lhk3aj2quio69ek4p02mgdiedhaniqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z14v569tlld7crsla39bfbopsgjk26gi66jvdmmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaeaeemqtffqbqoohifblue5rp9p8dqb8odonh18_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z13o6anepm1m1julmbul9imrv0bqa29q1rhu4188_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgc6hvdo3i4mpo5aaafv7i5bt998lmkqa25bu25o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf3t7qce3ribbuio48br3drbnpflm4omirceqv7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zorja3k8rf4tmb4o8lf8irnl2qo3hflbao3heu58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmo1f6eqtedniu8r92f9tiaga1mmhmvcma79tlpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbbqvfv3oadh3u7huo4btrm9rtf70e3r7ve0jk18_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb9afq5q9bb3ik63d9gred4g6hije103f07du6f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs7johpr0vhi2mit22e03s10q6qtea4si1im08p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8pb59p9rqe3bn034dnkv5s9fh1dr9l7s9hhi06o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z0re4p1fvo08e1jp215980bbkkqv7fsl8ho32pco).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1crf8888hc2aklna4arv4k5dk2pqbcu781qgee0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4c9ie2or6cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
