name: Senator Kennedy
subject: I’m announcing my intention.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
I'll just come right out with it.

| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c7f49cc074444c08d3b7ce185fea5a2&_e=fgpQb69a3EPXJuhqEAdFeezYAXtyn1IWAkdssOpb8I10g87ym-kdgKcgdwQ3W9PMaVXpHxC-vgWxzqkFKBMT4yl5OyPzgoM6kGyck2On1bv3Jz_YKkk1X08j2xwJJhGYVzWY3xmb6nYU7y4UHDHZtzhDEOjtFygO1ueG6Nse0k4TBPv3E_Yqt-0HXW3wAU6lOdHPQnwp7MlbJqJMXlvpc-LpoLt_S-YAvfVXjyriM4Qx6HW2xR2C3zzVDKWb13IbdLRxu6pX9Rc3kmMXtqbPMXomthfOdqCsxJAA1DRgbomj2kCBAjxm_frAzH4-gDS24Q1RMZQWiYmY5GhU1O7W0Bb9VWgnUm34kWU_JpuynAE6gyClUhPO2JOPLeTIfBWWARgwToOohKr_BTGg2qmHeoCYLX2KMPD69xINuKllGdihg66lyDGmiAVx6-ceoZfrC5iMSFF80tAdq1uiYVa7PQkor4QTj-ClD1ITAHSk7npiHgMMBJSnB_Ppe0otyDH0)
---

**_I 'm Officially announcing my intention to fulfill my End-of-Year Deadline._**
| [**RUSH ANYTHING FOR THE DEADLINE**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c7f49cc074444c08d3b7ce185fea5a2&_e=fgpQb69a3EPXJuhqEAdFeezYAXtyn1IWAkdssOpb8I10g87ym-kdgKcgdwQ3W9PMaVXpHxC-vgWxzqkFKBMT4yl5OyPzgoM6kGyck2On1bv3Jz_YKkk1X08j2xwJJhGYVzWY3xmb6nYU7y4UHDHZtzhDEOjtFygO1ueG6Nse0k4TBPv3E_Yqt-0HXW3wAU6lOdHPQnwp7MlbJqJMXlvpc-LpoLt_S-YAvfVXjyriM4Qx6HW2xR2C3zzVDKWb13IbdLRxu6pX9Rc3kmMXtqbPMXomthfOdqCsxJAA1DRgbomj2kCBAjxm_frAzH4-gDS24Q1RMZQWiYmY5GhU1O7W0Nupkb_rV4SocTB126AOCGeSc446-NZJS6vOgJ_V7CZuGxHDUTjGWK371VqcoH_yFNxScj4qWbRyV-MKCdjhmpzIuUjuVGv2DRo_1dR3tcbaJ-YhgTWGSVKQwH6NbWJTPik-VgrXDK2wEnPR9bUNBIo4Tv8dcFiFekyW07TlJu23)
---

Friend,

I've never been more excited to send you a message, and I know I could use some good news for once. Ever since I told everyone I was getting serious about this deadline, I've heard many things about my intentions. Frankly, to the critics -- run along to our liberal friends if you've got a bone to pick; I don't want to hear it.

**"Fulfilling this is a statistical unicorn. It can never happen."

"You're crazy to expect this deadline to be reached, Senator Kennedy."

"You're living in fantasy land."

"You're one egg short of a dozen."

[Blah blah blah, I could care less if these critics don't believe in us -- I DO.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c7f49cc074444c08d3b7ce185fea5a2&_e=fgpQb69a3EPXJuhqEAdFeezYAXtyn1IWAkdssOpb8I10g87ym-kdgKcgdwQ3W9PMaVXpHxC-vgWxzqkFKBMT4yl5OyPzgoM6kGyck2On1bv3Jz_YKkk1X08j2xwJJhGYVzWY3xmb6nYU7y4UHDHZtzhDEOjtFygO1ueG6Nse0k4TBPv3E_Yqt-0HXW3wAU6lOdHPQnwp7MlbJqJMXlvpc-LpoLt_S-YAvfVXjyriM4Qx6HW2xR2C3zzVDKWb13IbdLRxu6pX9Rc3kmMXtqbPMXomthfOdqCsxJAA1DRgbomj2kCBAjxm_frAzH4-gDS24Q1RMZQWiYmY5GhU1O7W0Bb9VWgnUm34kWU_JpuynAHDNk6LunQm4aXtB200lioLQQPkRSBBAOurTexW3wj9WAugXuZ8TYqLeeoBOUOhG4SFNr7TSXxGX000IoyTm8N4PCVz5kS7UT_6OZK86ndasLd0aN46KKKOzTvkZDKNzffbgVvZIG77yej8zIiq3KP_)

I'm finishing this deadline if it's the last thing I do. I'll wade myself through the Mississippi with a chain on my foot if it means that I've got a shot at making my end-of-year goals.

[I wanted to take a few minutes today to reach out to you -- Friend. I'm counting on your help.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1c7f49cc074444c08d3b7ce185fea5a2&_e=fgpQb69a3EPXJuhqEAdFeezYAXtyn1IWAkdssOpb8I10g87ym-kdgKcgdwQ3W9PMaVXpHxC-vgWxzqkFKBMT4yl5OyPzgoM6kGyck2On1bv3Jz_YKkk1X08j2xwJJhGYVzWY3xmb6nYU7y4UHDHZtzhDEOjtFygO1ueG6Nse0k4TBPv3E_Yqt-0HXW3wAU6lOdHPQnwp7MlbJqJMXlvpc-LpoLt_S-YAvfVXjyriM4Qx6HW2xR2C3zzVDKWb13IbdLRxu6pX9Rc3kmMXtqbPMXomthfOdqCsxJAA1DRgbomj2kCBAjxm_frAzH4-gDS24Q1RMZQWiYmY5GhU1O7W0Bb9VWgnUm34kWU_JpuynAFoYpVkokvNzmVCqs3zMQ9Jbf6NZ1INOiy_OpLJUn88Il6jR0WnJN-wug1ESyjV5358Lmb9I8ysghE3AwDnLHieHvxHO5-vQAvv5SwNCYeyY54u7FDyIYglEt74cJU_D4ubJ1r4sKVnhtyfWhQ2zjJ-)

clean_body: I'll just come right out with it. | I 'm Officially announcing my intention to fulfill my End-of-Year Deadline. | Friend, I've never been more excited to send you a message, and I know I could use some good news for once. Ever since I told everyone I was getting serious about this deadline, I've heard many things about my intentions. Frankly, to the critics -- run along to our liberal friends if you've got a bone to pick; I don't want to hear it. "Fulfilling this is a statistical unicorn. It can never happen." "You're crazy to expect this deadline to be reached, Senator Kennedy." "You're living in fantasy land." "You're one egg short of a dozen." I'm finishing this deadline if it's the last thing I do. I'll wade myself through the Mississippi with a chain on my foot if it means that I've got a shot at making my end-of-year goals. - Before we get to the crunch time, I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, or ANYTHING you can spare -- if you contribute to my campaign ONCE, I promise you've heard the last of me for a while, you'll have done your part. Best, John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class.** Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

subject: the REAL reason behind rising crime…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
There’s one trend behind this crime wave, but it’s not what you think... | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=793594098cb24b89a572da65969584e0&_e=Tg-N4vrCNzfiSIlPZXKwsW7KZNNZ0kNW3K_W-GIMhA8SvI660GG0Dgy0lbwMksXzWrmqEyW1OgPDc1bauXOwq0XYAuTvUz5lhelY1FCiSLt_hAp72mjj-aw3G4Oe5r248o9doS98k3q-IkQchus2NBetxV-u0qd4wNOYyTp57DFauOwccOIESiPjoKRTjKKkQCyZzSTgEXQgN2Hxv9s3mYKIHJSNTlcs0uw409QETqrZWvC-1nWG8uy8w3DCQ48CwlZVrCvX4EjkoiqnTdv2Fl00Kn3XRnIIXPS5lfUL17aN9gVe0bASmdzE1LY493w4JzLQMUA3JWJ9H3FqzRcWTYi0SKEwrW8oGykvE9JWEHnBxGepR7xu9WnQ71WTcqjF-Lkb3_PYFAn-obIjdWaZxA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I want to share a headline with you today -- not because it's remarkable, but because right now, _it 's sadly unremarkable_.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=793594098cb24b89a572da65969584e0&_e=Tg-N4vrCNzfiSIlPZXKwsW7KZNNZ0kNW3K_W-GIMhA8SvI660GG0Dgy0lbwMksXzWrmqEyW1OgPDc1bauXOwq0XYAuTvUz5lhelY1FCiSLt_hAp72mjj-aw3G4Oe5r248o9doS98k3q-IkQchus2NBetxV-u0qd4wNOYyTp57DFauOwccOIESiPjoKRTjKKkQCyZzSTgEXQgN2Hxv9s3mYKIHJSNTlcs0uw409QETqrZWvC-1nWG8uy8w3DCQ48Ci1L70vW_XselANB2EmO5ulbM-LyA5JsayNuKMmFZ1r6_Lq_OIThfM04e9DV_sPqtOBcMaIXxkg_kZJLKl1GXLpXvyDdtnV82c4Ko2Pb6JZc0d5CJ-wJwNkbIIbkbGaUjffYKnSfzcJk2ATlCoMNoLg%3D%3D)
---
**Friend,_this headline is the new normal for the criminal justice system in our country -- and it's exactly why our nation is suffering a massive crime wave._** How did this happen? A network of radical activists and billionaires, including George Soros, quietly poured tens of millions of dollars into local prosecutor races.
---
[**HELP US STOP THEM**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=793594098cb24b89a572da65969584e0&_e=Tg-N4vrCNzfiSIlPZXKwsW7KZNNZ0kNW3K_W-GIMhA8SvI660GG0Dgy0lbwMksXzWrmqEyW1OgPDc1bauXOwq0XYAuTvUz5lhelY1FCiSLt_hAp72mjj-aw3G4Oe5r248o9doS98k3q-IkQchus2NBetxV-u0qd4wNOYyTp57DFauOwccOIESiPjoKRTjKKkQCyZzSTgEXQgN2Hxv9s3mYKIHJSNTlcs0uw409QETqrZWvC-1nWG8uy8w3DCQ48CmRgLZ3JGjmEu8EAPufGtxLxFDXyaJhB7ghjqj-adrWTsNhn28kFpIZdK35Ys8iUN1D0D9IgnF5wXnjfiSwztNX3YrM5m6hPzApfaxxKJON5rE52niqMO_sgTUhcf2KBDnvSuPu1ZckXDnbN5H_ttwg%3D%3D)
---
That tidal wave of cash overwhelmed these under-the-radar elections and placed radicals into prominent law enforcement positions.
And, once they got there, they stopped enforcing the parts of the law they didn't like -- and the effect has been dire.
_**At this point, they are not just failing to address rising crime but actually causing it**_** _._ **Letting violent offenders go free, eliminating bail, and treating criminals like victims only leads to more victims of violent crime.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=793594098cb24b89a572da65969584e0&_e=Tg-N4vrCNzfiSIlPZXKwsW7KZNNZ0kNW3K_W-GIMhA8SvI660GG0Dgy0lbwMksXzWrmqEyW1OgPDc1bauXOwq0XYAuTvUz5lhelY1FCiSLt_hAp72mjj-aw3G4Oe5r248o9doS98k3q-IkQchus2NBetxV-u0qd4wNOYyTp57DFauOwccOIESiPjoKRTjKKkQCyZzSTgEXQgN2Hxv9s3mYKIHJSNTlcs0uw409QETqrZWvC-1nWG8uy8w3DCQ48CQJ9gZqcyDKF-G1FjpVYvmMISxhTxCIHQA1PPMIXqG-50YUuE9yDXGr6LxHSkSyOB6pQYTeo5KNO0n0Rt2NvJPIEGj0vfDFe_6tHhU8nZUch6kdAkTHwWHEM5veO7r4o380Sp_PMEuO39_gWqtOysnw%3D%3D)
---
Leftist-controlled cities like San Francisco and Chicago show the terrible, corrosive effect of radical prosecutors. We refuse to let far-left activists destroy our neighborhoods. **At Fair Courts America, we 're standing up to the tens of millions of dollars that deep-pocketed liberal megadonors and woke activists are pouring into these races. ** We make sure voters get the facts so they can elect prosecutors and judges who actually do their jobs -- not activists who let criminals walk free. That is the ONLY way to ensure a future with equal justice under the law, as the founders intended. _That 's why Fair Courts America exists. _ **And today, we need YOUR help to keep the streets safe and our justice system free and fair. Will you step up?_[https://secure.winred.com/fair-courts-america/stop-radical-prosecutors](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=793594098cb24b89a572da65969584e0&_e=Tg-N4vrCNzfiSIlPZXKwsW7KZNNZ0kNW3K_W-GIMhA8SvI660GG0Dgy0lbwMksXzWrmqEyW1OgPDc1bauXOwq0XYAuTvUz5lhelY1FCiSLt_hAp72mjj-aw3G4Oe5r248o9doS98k3q-IkQchus2NBetxV-u0qd4wNOYyTp57DFauOwccOIESiPjoKRTjKKkQCyZzSTgEXQgN2Hxv9s3mYKIHJSNTlcs0uw409QETqrZWvC-1nWG8uy8w3DCQ48CqOCBPv_ifVtQ8eFOMNKeS-u5RlC7f-HQwaBMH-TcYK27yNXSZqaZpXBsOAc8aV2fY53TiaSaFpdQwIxvIrG3OHqvwOINDba2A23rEJbU7i2uDjxyapbKMiN5mTD0Bbl7Lw_9N7cQymKt4i4v6AHQGw%3D%3D)_** In justice, Andrew Wynne _Executive Director_ **Fair Courts America**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
| Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8d7tvkq06b4qd3ab4e6h0cvmk01spivuu03j6r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpg60o32cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z36hkj33tu07m00o39na353rb2gnp3guitdf0nvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpg60o32cth2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty — the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf8602l5fhdhh1137bs23af3cq2ug8g04oqspg90_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpg60o32cth2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z2iee80oicl9p9clt27vqod0873hroaj31mku8i8).625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Gift Idea
body:
| | |
---
Many of us will spend time this weekend reviewing our Christmas gift lists, and making sure that everything is in order. Gifts for aunts, uncles, kids, spouses, and a little something for the neighbors. But what do you get the person in your life who wants to stay up-to-date on the news, enjoys movies, and loves America? May I suggest a virtual cinema ticket to our latest documentary, _Innovation Race?_ It’s the perfect gift all wrapped up in one virtual package. Simply [go to the website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNTEtOWNjZDNkMmIyNmI2NGUwMGFjMWNlMDhmNzU3MzI0N2QiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHA6Ly93YXRjaC5pbm5vdmF0aW9ucmFjZW1vdmllLmNvbS8_bWlkPTQ2MjEyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/GZy4mQnh_fyGKxg4FrAe5g) to buy your Virtual Cinema tickets and get all of the details.
---
[PURCHASE TICKETS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
A Virtual Cinema ticket to _Innovation Race_ is the perfect stocking stuffer, ‘thank you’ card embellishment, or ‘I’m thinking of you’ gift for anyone on your list, so don’t delay. Check those remaining people off your list today! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
|
---
**FILM SYNOPSIS** For the past century, America has been the world leader in ideas, invention, and innovation. Developing new technologies to solve complex issues as well as tools to make our lives more comfortable and efficient is the realization of the American dream for many. But our grip on ‘world leader’ status is loosening as China has emerged as a powerful political and industrial force. Today, China is threatening American innovation by exploiting weaknesses in US patent protection, and big tech is letting them get away with it. _Innovation Race_ explores these critical issues impacting all Americans, and proposes solutions for how we can restore US dominance in invention, technology and innovation.

name: Your America
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7532%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=sXL0rcQl4UbeVWK7jXwRZQ&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97170%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oxBPJOc3%2beTcFJpgmgVTIA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97171%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2cQr7%2bICnS5RPUZzZuglBQ&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97172%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cGfazuXwrsfyJfyhamfhLg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97173%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PoLRCHFcafnWJ63wgyCZfg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7532%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=sXL0rcQl4UbeVWK7jXwRZQ&sysid=1)_

name: Lila Rose
subject: THIS leads to 4x more abortions!
body:
Live Action’s research team recently shared a heartbreaking study exposing Planned Parenthood’s secret to raking billions of dollars in profit.

| [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27d4a9e9ba504bcc8b18ca06e41158f8&_e=g3dASy5Rt_ypB5ooUjM7o4tpq8JUCmDzjGIg8XxPr21B3U6PwpHuS9_uNJJyF_1W3LVL1wyO41jl9O1RqelQn2u_iV5VB29yMmeo1nM_Ib7PogYV8wij50KrPOSJ5T0XtFJbfgzSl-qaQcuqmei0DqQnI57Msok9g31mR456K5uNK8DI6XaELtw_4UniymCU1KVayo--E_HHAUku8wSQp0J_ynFe_bZe5HntqEmKmgMxx0R0lVWEIcEuv9ex8EoYExFoQqBXCVaFSqNZzICS09n1UC-gGeJTt1zjD2aWTVX1POKsd1PlKpX98lIrQRaP_c0Vrh-70ymM_z6JAqZIHRsg9LKNYLAmS2Id8XhevqgQNhaj-UK9D6KNmG6p-7tvvYtgCU0poo35tXt_A_oaSQ%3D%3D) [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27d4a9e9ba504bcc8b18ca06e41158f8&_e=g3dASy5Rt_ypB5ooUjM7o4tpq8JUCmDzjGIg8XxPr21B3U6PwpHuS9_uNJJyF_1W3LVL1wyO41jl9O1RqelQn2u_iV5VB29yMmeo1nM_Ib7PogYV8wij50KrPOSJ5T0XtFJbfgzSl-qaQcuqmei0DqQnI57Msok9g31mR456K5uNK8DI6XaELtw_4UniymCU1KVayo--E_HHAUku8wSQp0J_ynFe_bZe5HntqEmKmgMxx0R0lVWEIcEuv9ex8EoYarsCJMmpAJcuX0Ga0x5MW2inzLjAN1V5todrEKKnMfYsIicpTBqWo_535abCXL0YX-N8od9TMe_hnttxnkdCKX2NGt6j2u3fsMoYWUHMde0xX-Ax1HHSLWAanBW6qlFtwifnajf0F7EKCLY3S5BOaA%3D%3D)
---
#
Friend of life,

Live Action's research team recently shared a heartbreaking study exposing Planned Parenthood's secret to raking billions of dollars in profit.

The study analyzed young women based on the outcomes of their first pregnancies. The mothers who aborted their first babies had 4x more abortions over their lifetimes.

4x. That's the secret to Planned Parenthood's profitability. They know that if they can convince a woman to have her first baby killed, they will have her on the hook for another abortion.

**[Give now to reach an abortion-minded mom with the truth before it's too late.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27d4a9e9ba504bcc8b18ca06e41158f8&_e=g3dASy5Rt_ypB5ooUjM7o4tpq8JUCmDzjGIg8XxPr21B3U6PwpHuS9_uNJJyF_1W3LVL1wyO41jl9O1RqelQn2u_iV5VB29yMmeo1nM_Ib7PogYV8wij50KrPOSJ5T0XtFJbfgzSl-qaQcuqmei0DqQnI57Msok9g31mR456K5uNK8DI6XaELtw_4UniymCU1KVayo--E_HHAUku8wSQp0J_ynFe_bZe5HntqEmKmgMxx0R0lVWEIcEuv9ex8EoYzJuyUMr2edj2df2sJubh2ouDP1F1ZLWe5Uave1rUh1CRRCaLtJg8AVyJPhhLLG5cpv_u7jWv3ISFr7iu44OatY6k5QK4vEEJv0c9c5kJmw4-hO5HW1dHFfkeg0n_SoJv_68GCz4M4R8jpkg8hk4S0w%3D%3D)**

The co-author of the study rightly noted, "A woman's first pregnancy shapes the course of her life." Unless a mother and all those influencing her decision can break out of Big Abortion's sphere of deception by learning the truth, the consequence for her and for our culture at large is devastating.

The good news is that you can reach a young woman with the truth and save her from a life of abortions by giving right now. For a limited time, your gift will be doubled dollar for dollar. LINK

The reason Planned Parenthood's sex-ed propaganda spreads so quickly is that it is more accessible than the pro-life alternatives. Unfortunately, pro-life sex ed has often been outdated, uninteresting, or unavailable, and thus unable to attract the attention of modern teens.

That's why in 2023 we will be releasing sex ed resources that can be used by schools, parents, churches, and community groups to empower young women and men to discover a sexual ethic that leads to more life-long marriages and zero abortions.

We reach more young people online with viral content than any other pro-life organization. That's why we have the unique experience and expertise to craft resources that will go viral instead of sitting unused on the shelf.

Teens will want to see these videos because they will be engaging, interesting, and unforgettable. The overarching message will resonate because it will focus on love and respect, which is what every woman and man desires.

But none of this happens without you.

Your gift right now will enable us to create the first-ever pro-life sexual health curriculum designed to go viral and transform young minds from pro-death to pro-life. And, for a limited time, your gift will be MATCHED by generous donors.

Every dollar reaches 34 more people, so a matched gift of as little as $15 reaches more than 1,000 young people with life-saving TRUTH.

Click this link before the matching challenge ends: **[https://give.liveaction.org/save-more-children-2023/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27d4a9e9ba504bcc8b18ca06e41158f8&_e=g3dASy5Rt_ypB5ooUjM7o4tpq8JUCmDzjGIg8XxPr21B3U6PwpHuS9_uNJJyF_1W3LVL1wyO41jl9O1RqelQn2u_iV5VB29yMmeo1nM_Ib7PogYV8wij50KrPOSJ5T0XtFJbfgzSl-qaQcuqmei0DqQnI57Msok9g31mR456K5uNK8DI6XaELtw_4UniymCU1KVayo--E_HHAUku8wSQp0J_ynFe_bZe5HntqEmKmgMxx0R0lVWEIcEuv9ex8EoYtP0mtWhgIPNheArvWwVHggECKjVXbeT2a0ONRQcLrAhkDbaQuOyHnvPTn444u0aqytE3xxz7_PwV_eR_mehXF3TJ8decv4jsPzKYGt6D7On4kdlWX-ag9SP2S2ClXKgPqhR_VRnAuYrjWlrOIFEShg%3D%3D)**

Planned Parenthood thinks we don't know what they're up to. But we do, and together we can captivate young people with the truth about love and sex and deny Big Abortion its most reliable income, saving countless babies from violent death.

For life,

**Lila Rose**
Founder and President

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. |
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9469f01fa5684d118bf234783f9380e4&_e=gvAU-k3m_Jq-bmsNJRv-Kycr8c72VrYidkruCTzkvAQ2rP4VfHQHDuEG8VV53PqHyslg3BakJ7uwc6tRKaP46nf1MwXmnz0vVXnknmzQoE-AHMa5gXAdJtWRD3dBBgShmUF3IZUy3oS0uZ6bixtrDGEARZDve7R6kxPhSgUF1tzaZNUbbAWR_h8a9DSj5BTeDX4YK00IqKmu3QIXoRp9Br3bZWUSEvCxj9EQZrA8jI6mUGNdiTRrsyO4D04Jbx312hhLBZyPvmQ1qpTu3irHv_-aFaAfL8l9uRMUiqKI6a0eOMmFFLcszHidGg8n7EjAW6MUc_-U-TLD8s1Vb90VMWlJ6EOLDnk2LwfHUJUhAZS8trFBZaePN3E2bFDu0cDR)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9469f01fa5684d118bf234783f9380e4&_e=gvAU-k3m_Jq-bmsNJRv-Kycr8c72VrYidkruCTzkvAQ2rP4VfHQHDuEG8VV53PqHyslg3BakJ7uwc6tRKaP46nf1MwXmnz0vVXnknmzQoE-AHMa5gXAdJtWRD3dBBgShmUF3IZUy3oS0uZ6bixtrDGEARZDve7R6kxPhSgUF1tzaZNUbbAWR_h8a9DSj5BTeDX4YK00IqKmu3QIXoRp9Br3bZWUSEvCxj9EQZrA8jI6yfEMkaBN_RpaRXI30rwS5hLxBi53LortCoTBj4iXEMAOJ3pIEdf2dcLw0TA2rC3lRUHXKUKkD93PHLAXOKd3H1B1O_WhwD6FkkX-DJSc0Tnv9ttbNM3E-su4Um6OKxAikrjsrfZWpuF_fljnLPr_L) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9469f01fa5684d118bf234783f9380e4&_e=gvAU-k3m_Jq-bmsNJRv-Kycr8c72VrYidkruCTzkvAQ2rP4VfHQHDuEG8VV53PqHyslg3BakJ7uwc6tRKaP46nf1MwXmnz0vVXnknmzQoE-AHMa5gXAdJtWRD3dBBgShmUF3IZUy3oS0uZ6bixtrDGEARZDve7R6kxPhSgUF1tzaZNUbbAWR_h8a9DSj5BTeDX4YK00IqKmu3QIXoRp9Br3bZWUSEvCxj9EQZrA8jI4noqA6tWhOjkf8zRXie3YFwYRouqTG0UgLRtl5AvIHvLxyV-Yi7RO6unfD-Yp1h70eCPOFANWZzcZlSRRyc0MF5cPjN8cP26MDvENg-apsHXyX8erPo_ObrM4iO04BKp_aizXFbcy5bfCL9fvqNk9-)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9469f01fa5684d118bf234783f9380e4&_e=gvAU-k3m_Jq-bmsNJRv-Kycr8c72VrYidkruCTzkvAQ2rP4VfHQHDuEG8VV53PqHyslg3BakJ7uwc6tRKaP46nf1MwXmnz0vVXnknmzQoE-AHMa5gXAdJtWRD3dBBgShmUF3IZUy3oS0uZ6bixtrDGEARZDve7R6kxPhSgUF1tzaZNUbbAWR_h8a9DSj5BTeDX4YK00IqKmu3QIXoRp9Br3bZWUSEvCxj9EQZrA8jI55fHasndZ_7u2STFE-re86DUETHwwWLLOOwLR_hfAnCPRdwbls4vKVicOZnJSxkvIItWTF72-mpjCilGhNT1CRxEKPj8XyBxaCQHncUbjqNF-L6z9ER11kFDd-2wDYA7xcXnLrqMHzvF5Gaxki0M_B)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9469f01fa5684d118bf234783f9380e4&_e=gvAU-k3m_Jq-bmsNJRv-Kycr8c72VrYidkruCTzkvAQ2rP4VfHQHDuEG8VV53PqHyslg3BakJ7uwc6tRKaP46nf1MwXmnz0vVXnknmzQoE-AHMa5gXAdJtWRD3dBBgShmUF3IZUy3oS0uZ6bixtrDGEARZDve7R6kxPhSgUF1tzaZNUbbAWR_h8a9DSj5BTeDX4YK00IqKmu3QIXoRp9Br3bZWUSEvCxj9EQZrA8jI4p3zWViBm2WuS22_TeAHL4JtnJs3tB-q5NTW8LNp1KvYA1mGIsQ6WB8v_eaBy0-8wRwXaMrRKJOCJ7Rs9bo3HPJqJPIdnhUsW95OarbtGvuXoutmGwIL2DWJHTCaSis-lUmytB_0gi8Q-7WWbZTZIT)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9469f01fa5684d118bf234783f9380e4&_e=gvAU-k3m_Jq-bmsNJRv-Kycr8c72VrYidkruCTzkvAQ2rP4VfHQHDuEG8VV53PqHyslg3BakJ7uwc6tRKaP46nf1MwXmnz0vVXnknmzQoE-AHMa5gXAdJtWRD3dBBgShmUF3IZUy3oS0uZ6bixtrDGEARZDve7R6kxPhSgUF1tzaZNUbbAWR_h8a9DSj5BTeDX4YK00IqKmu3QIXoRp9Br3bZWUSEvCxj9EQZrA8jI5rBzULM95AFSU-4K3pmqb8T3Oq5clmLF_ymgp4GlObFCd0tDcdWukIju8Up8Khu4rbf_4xJb0ToSFF7gSnen407UTr-nP-BEDjouE0UT1M_iERTQMLOG1MEXwCuCE_X4ggtq8wS_Vfo5mYuh4ADU8e)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
---

| Peter,
Last week, it was CONFIRMED that Twitter + the Deep State + the DNC worked together to hurt Trump in the weeks before the election AND regularly "shadow-banned" other conservatives across the board AND pushed to PERMANENTLY BAN ME without cause!
The ones who call you and me a 'threat to democracy' sure like putting their thumb on the scale to prevent MAGA Republicans from getting a fair shake!
And here's why this is so important, Peter - when we are in the majority next year, Republicans will have a choice:

* Do we use every tool at our disposal to INVESTIGATE the "10% for the Big Guy" corruption and EXPOSE the full truth of this Twitter scandal...

* Or do we make a weak weatherman who calls on Big Tech to censor conservatives - and who was called the "tech industry's best friend" (!) - our next Speaker while we sit on our hands and do NOTHING??

I think I know where you stand, but just in case, let me know right now...
[Are you ready to join this FIGHT to expose Twitter, Biden, and the Feds?? ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QJclG_du-Z5-tjtJhOgATKoY-i5CsTWQJr3nYMHPYaeYVqGHDkyc3Bqaclh3H8GZqINwIkU2YdaTc78aiVGdtEVSskCsmDBjGjPn2hT4UZhS4sfYty6LCXefzTjg_pM0zoGLA1EJiWZCvcAd5eD7eL_JgDTjS4cdezWbLOy1D447FlH26k40hsytilpbnaKso_Yk1YEzuHQ=&c=6mieOeVLqHQWnJiAk0u0KJRV5fRoRwqid-f7CeMxEXx1WfxTbDJVhQ==&ch=mwzDSIkzydvoipGIUw80b2ThVn7mZEFQG54E96bCM4fpC_bGA92Uzw==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Why we should be upbeat about Mississippi – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132708?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**We all know how much the media misrepresents Mississippi.** They’ve been doing it for years.

Mississippi, they love to imply, is poor and backward. The Magnolia state, they suggest, is defined by an inglorious past.

Hold on a minute. **That idea of Mississippi is wildly out of date. **

**Here are five great things about the state of our state:**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=20a9d140e0&e=5703353baa "Mississippi is Great: Don't let the media deceive you!")
---
|
1. **Mississippi is growing**

**There will soon be three million Mississippians – the highest number of people living in the state ever. **

As California, New York and Illinois and other badly run states lose population, Mississippi’s long term population decline has stopped. Official US census data shows that between 2010 and 2020 the population of our state grew.

1. **Mississippi is getting richer**

**Back in 2002, the average per person income in our state was a little over $20,000 in today’s dollars. Today, it is over $47,000.** People in our state are more than twice as rich as they were back then.

Sure, our state has some pockets of poverty. Find me a state that doesn’t. Overall, however, in the past decade Mississippi incomes have increased at 3.6 percent a year – faster than most other states.

**Over the next 12 months, Mississippi's average income is expected to overtake that of my own country, the United Kingdom for the first time ever.**

1. **State-wide success**

**Too many media folk in Mississippi live and work in Jackson. That means they tend to see everything through the prism of a dysfunctional city. **

If they looked a little further, they might see the extraordinary growth happening in Hattiesburg and Laurel. Or the development happening all along the Gulf Coast. Or the businesses popping up around the university towns of Oxford and Starkville.

**There’s a lot of great things happening in our state if you look for it.**

1. **Mississippi has an amazing quality of life**

When I lived in London England, getting to the office from home never took under an hour. In Mississippi, a traffic jam means two red lights in a row.

It’s a cliché to say folk in Mississippi are friendly, but it happens to be true. You literally get stopped buying groceries or gas by people just wanting to chat.

**Everyone has heard about the idea of six degrees of separation. That’s the theory that we can connect with any other individual on the planet through a chain of half a dozen acquaintances. Here in Mississippi, it only take two or three.**

1. **The new South**

**Recent decades have seen the emergence of a new South.** From Texas to Georgia, Tennessee through to Florida, there has been tremendous growth and development. Our state is part of that southern success story.

**Southern states are doing well because those that run them tend to keep taxes low and regulations light.** That allows businesses – big and small – to prosper.

**Mississippi is starting to join that southern success story.** This year we significantly cut our state income tax. Mississippi’s leaders have implemented a far reaching red tape reduction strategy, giving people with professional qualifications issued in other US states a near automatic right to practice in Mississippi.

But why, I often wonder, does Mississippi’s progressive media seem to delight in talking down our state?

During the recent Jackson water crisis, a story of epic incompetence on the part of city officials was twisted into a narrative about historic racism and inequality.

That was absurd. **It is ridiculous to ignore all the positive things about our state by trying to see everything that happens in Mississippi through the prism of the distant past. **

The median age of people in Mississippi is 37. That means most people in our state were born after 1985.

**Today’s Mississippi story is a story of success – and it needs to be told. That is the real news about our state.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c89ad65abe&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=c06684d76b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=c06684d76b).

| Peter,

Throughout Abigail's career, from the CIA to the halls of Congress, _**a dedication to public service has united her work**_. That much has been clear in her accomplishments in Congress, and local political experts agree:
---
| | **Editorial: Spanberger is reviving politics as public service**

"Abigail Spanberger is a refreshing new type of politician working to return the idea of public service to political life."

_\- Fredericksburg Free Lance Star_

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c768f3434f54996bb4bbe13a939dd0a&_e=R6tbwPq6HOPPkROtRdl-fgq-RGGyKxWVT0xYVe4_l6A9LmDxEzPb5vxWq2kheNhJdwvtZPptL-3_9oRmwoZHJbsmiUMGQVHPgNfy5x-uW8LLCKiULxfjVwT3OmShEXQfo34NnSeZLDDsRBIy7AO-E6OEj-HWXJZVzPqCp4f0Gb0zPE-MMPg8RNNnhmr_Ba_iWCgENXiJ5CI8v3l7YwprGLHYqm0RFG4FymQ3AqHkC25qdzwt34nOKdoO-UqgLAk5yMqxI7mYQVaQrVw08nyhSEojN5FkY2goyKysnTNAlU1FHrNjEHxIbXORuGgeZlV8F1QLpAoM_GR8j_AmABYkHes0gbpouZoJvUcaGbh1-mpyOwILzkX8azFGTcKG8DCtgxCNNvc5rUpNrMxcvBm9D_mn0sKcR67p7vLjrvnlzd0%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c768f3434f54996bb4bbe13a939dd0a&_e=R6tbwPq6HOPPkROtRdl-fgq-RGGyKxWVT0xYVe4_l6A9LmDxEzPb5vxWq2kheNhJdwvtZPptL-3_9oRmwoZHJbsmiUMGQVHPgNfy5x-uW8LLCKiULxfjVwT3OmShEXQfo34NnSeZLDDsRBIy7AO-E6OEj-HWXJZVzPqCp4f0Gb0zPE-MMPg8RNNnhmr_Ba_iWCgENXiJ5CI8v3l7YwprGLHYqm0RFG4FymQ3AqHkC25qdzwt34nOKdoO-UqgLAk5wIA9mi73Pj2XLnT17-_CbZ5nmCFjVK7WYJ_wZZHetz3ChXLpUk71wV_6PD-utfj0AH9avRufnHXfxrH752z5CDN2SLaHkWwqfHUoURi69Qh8kh6j6tDCewSt3R6j7y26E7t28f2XtqRXn4kc8Js-RXGgN1rhN1aSVxm1m50jkTE%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c768f3434f54996bb4bbe13a939dd0a&_e=R6tbwPq6HOPPkROtRdl-fgq-RGGyKxWVT0xYVe4_l6A9LmDxEzPb5vxWq2kheNhJdwvtZPptL-3_9oRmwoZHJbsmiUMGQVHPgNfy5x-uW8LLCKiULxfjVwT3OmShEXQfo34NnSeZLDDsRBIy7AO-E6OEj-HWXJZVzPqCp4f0Gb0zPE-MMPg8RNNnhmr_Ba_iWCgENXiJ5CI8v3l7YwprGLHYqm0RFG4FymQ3AqHkC25qdzwt34nOKdoO-UqgLAk5PUaHVjRglbRtBtISqlowRNJHOjSAGjR4KgzoFipQcYGbhIB5LSBWjcOqasFKF0gPhNkZdIQWGAOd1cgS7sDb2bDgkXlyE1_pOM9Jm7pd0fNMGkhWfg3jXSGdxkv6gy65FZcn_I3ywVsskm19Su4OJ7ysdLwVefFUU0FinIPcAME%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to reach and teach millions has never been more urgently needed. That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
1776 Collection is back!
| | | | | | My Fellow Patriots,

As a proud Republican and avid patriot, I'm excited to let you know that my [1776 Collection ](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/LtFFjRgk67_bR1m2fIWswg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRlgFE0P0SKaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG9wZG9uanIuY29tL2Rpc2NvdW50L0ZSRUVET00_cmVkaXJlY3Q9JTJGY29sbGVjdGlvbnMlMkYxNzc2LWNvbGxlY3Rpb24mX2t4PVR1WEpaTllqRE9rOVItWkRmOHFkZ1JoTXdoNlBkS3J1SlhnbXRwS0UwRE0lM0QuWTJTWVlOVwNzcGNCCmOQNMydY8g1M9hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQABU_q)is still going on– full of patriotic apparel you can wear proudly!

This collection is for those who share my love of country, and who are proud of the freedoms that we enjoy in the United States. Whether you’re a veteran, a member of law enforcement, or a proud patriot, this collection is for you.

[The collection](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/LtFFjRgk67_bR1m2fIWswg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRlgFE0P0SKaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG9wZG9uanIuY29tL2Rpc2NvdW50L0ZSRUVET00_cmVkaXJlY3Q9JTJGY29sbGVjdGlvbnMlMkYxNzc2LWNvbGxlY3Rpb24mX2t4PVR1WEpaTllqRE9rOVItWkRmOHFkZ1JoTXdoNlBkS3J1SlhnbXRwS0UwRE0lM0QuWTJTWVlOVwNzcGNCCmOQNMydY8g1M9hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQABU_q) includes apparel for men, women. I put a lot of thought into this collection, and my goal was to create something that celebrates our love of country and the freedoms that we are privileged to enjoy here in the United States.

I’m excited to offer the [1776 Collection ](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/LtFFjRgk67_bR1m2fIWswg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRlgFE0P0SKaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG9wZG9uanIuY29tL2Rpc2NvdW50L0ZSRUVET00_cmVkaXJlY3Q9JTJGY29sbGVjdGlvbnMlMkYxNzc2LWNvbGxlY3Rpb24mX2t4PVR1WEpaTllqRE9rOVItWkRmOHFkZ1JoTXdoNlBkS3J1SlhnbXRwS0UwRE0lM0QuWTJTWVlOVwNzcGNCCmOQNMydY8g1M9hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQABU_q)at a discounted rate of 25% off with code "FREEDOM." body:

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2eh1pqmp2ij6f6idb564rqkia34tbvtflq5peh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpg6cor2cdh2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zubs5adn1220ao3n5gsauqetfg2ds90ap1ip1iqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cpg6cor2cdh2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

body:
| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That 's why I'm asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3163a569712b4aa58d430a526bb264bb&_e=xPsNuIkkK2s2cIltiRTZLIy8wcZ6ZVqrYTf13wp5CHedXOBf9U8FeAYgQk2tu-51DaDd2tGg2qpwmpakZ6N6KWHYi4LH8680bHOJGdlnz5MHVapA9IX4wj9w0BUIRdq_GgZ7FGzDS6Aia4hFWhKgjRCqQQnI6ugMV4-GEvM4pH0eUypMFwwZAaxRt1oPTP3NbTTcjr8T3Tf8WNZVfU4hhsHnRU-OG39OFZ1ADoU-VYVYMDCWM9cRwxA2hkEJF0Q0mKwochkjtXWOcfaJWSlUM933kK-mM_5zS9_D8_sOANpU-B4S1b9ZMvd6ZukIfkvrej5WE3-bLocN5mD6A81GWZv2X_W9uflEDzOTr1By5YK94cjH0UAbFfoFXnV9agikk5b2Bcq5mmekzw5nAknGgg%3D%3D) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they're doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we're going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that's exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** 's great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter's school and told that her daughter was now a "boy". She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was "transgender" and "bisexual"... Her impressionable daughter didn't even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica's innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy's name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a "Gender Support Plan" and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother's knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn 't be "trusted"****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They're not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They're not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They're not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent's values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now. **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3163a569712b4aa58d430a526bb264bb&_e=xPsNuIkkK2s2cIltiRTZLIy8wcZ6ZVqrYTf13wp5CHedXOBf9U8FeAYgQk2tu-51DaDd2tGg2qpwmpakZ6N6KWHYi4LH8680bHOJGdlnz5MHVapA9IX4wj9w0BUIRdq_GgZ7FGzDS6Aia4hFWhKgjRCqQQnI6ugMV4-GEvM4pH0eUypMFwwZAaxRt1oPTP3NbTTcjr8T3Tf8WNZVfU4hhsHnRU-OG39OFZ1ADoU-VYVYMDCWM9cRwxA2hkEJF0Q0qcC43PLV1jB5fLW0_ZSJvKxieouFuBr88o99m9DyCMKCsf4ejCwVvEeLC9VtqatUm9EDh_026csCpN6sEWi1sqNLE2VGRfjkq5267oMjofD8sU161jZwrezDPu20eFaEtdGQhm_E7LIyhjGO4jJyBQ%3D%3D) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and "interviewed" her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it's happening in secret so parents, grandparents and the community don't know what's going on. Jessica's innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don't act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It's horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That's why our lawsuit names the individual "teachers" \-- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3163a569712b4aa58d430a526bb264bb&_e=xPsNuIkkK2s2cIltiRTZLIy8wcZ6ZVqrYTf13wp5CHedXOBf9U8FeAYgQk2tu-51DaDd2tGg2qpwmpakZ6N6KWHYi4LH8680bHOJGdlnz5MHVapA9IX4wj9w0BUIRdq_GgZ7FGzDS6Aia4hFWhKgjRCqQQnI6ugMV4-GEvM4pH0eUypMFwwZAaxRt1oPTP3NbTTcjr8T3Tf8WNZVfU4hhsHnRU-OG39OFZ1ADoU-VYVYMDCWM9cRwxA2hkEJF0Q0povWjX7lnJ59MvuRkwTQFbA361paZWVUWY-onczVAcvqFIX_ECbq-LZek8u9rcnRN6JtIFp5WPiFS5bDLoGFkJRnfLdoYJD5L2gtbeOUIH16vze9X3ej8ffu9Tl37RUiaUXP7cJNVGF-FP8WECMN2w%3D%3D) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today - $50, $100, $250 or more - I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits - we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we're fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we're going to make them pay for their actions... clean_body: | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they're doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we're going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that's exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on Laura Ingraham 's great Fox News show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter's school and told that her daughter was now a "boy". She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was "transgender" and "bisexual"... Her impressionable daughter didn't even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica's innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy's name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a "Gender Support Plan" and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother's knowledge! And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn 't be "trusted". These people are not real teachers. They're not concerned with teaching our children to read... They're not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic... They're not concerned with teaching history... They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent's values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and "interviewed" her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it's happening in secret so parents, grandparents and the community don't know what's going on. Jessica's innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don't act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit The Ingraham Angle , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It's horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That's why our lawsuit names the individual "teachers" \-- we must hold them accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today - $50, $100, $250 or more - I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits - we WIN them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we're fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we're going to make them pay for their actions... We're ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can't do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon | | | P.S. The grooming and indoctrination happening in our schools must be stopped - and making the schools and individual "teachers" pay is the only way! That's why I'm asking you to join our critical lawsuit today. | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: =?utf-8?Q?Claudia=20Tenney?=
subject: slandered...smeared...shadowbanned—still fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by nearly 30,000 votes... | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9bccdcf350&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Friend, I’m Claudia Tenney –– I’m a _small business owner_ , _Marine mom_ , and _conservative congresswoman_ from New York. I’m also heading up the _Election Integrity Caucus_ , a position I was uniquely qualified for due to the events surrounding my 2020 election race. I was involved in a **100-DAY LONG** post-election recount and legal battle. At midnight of election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by _**NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**_
---
| [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b184aed500&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Even with outstanding absentee ballots, my opponent’s chance for victory was slim.
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a72d45cba1&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Over the next 90 days, we fought against a team of lawyers who abused the legal system and tried to cherry-pick ballots and play games in NY-22. They pulled out every shady tactic in the book to try to push my opponent ahead.
---
| | Eventually, the New York Supreme Court got involved and conducted a thorough, transparent, and fair review to all parties. **After every ballot had been scrutinized and every legal vote had counted, I was declared and certified the winner by a slim** _**123**_**votes! ****

****That didn’t stop my opponent or Nancy Pelosi from trying to overturn the results of my race and undermine me at every turn.** I decided that day that I never want what happened to me to happen to another candidate again, I was going to lead on reforming, securing, and auditing our election system.
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6854e8b0fa&e=fdefed58de)
---
That means implementing common-sense reforms such as: **➡️ Mandatory Voter IDs** **➡️ Banning Ballot Harvesting** **➡️ Preventing Unsolicited Ballots** And foremost, ensuring our elections are: **FREE ✅ FAIR ✅ACCURATE ✅ TRANSPARENT ✅** For leading this fight, I’ve been constantly attacked: **Slandered by the Radical Left...** **Smeared by the Mainstream Media...** **Shadowbanned by Big Tech...****

** But I will not be intimidated. I will not be silenced. And I will never back down. That’s because I’m fighting to take back New York, I’m fighting to save America, and I’m fighting for you! **Friend, they wouldn’t be attacking me if I weren’t effective in this fight—**[**a fight that I hope you’ll consider supporting with a small donation today!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e9cf7932ac&e=fdefed58de) [ ](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dccca32272&e=fdefed58de) Thank you, Claudia Tenney
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ffb14da57a&e=fdefed58de)
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---

name: Giffords
subject: A decade of progress
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In the ten years since the tragic mass shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School, over 525 gun safety laws have been passed at the state level.
#

Friends -
On December 14, 2012, the tragic shooting that killed 20 children and 6 adults at Sandy Hook Elementary School shook our nation. From that day forward, we entered a new era of the gun safety movement in our country.
Maybe it was Sandy Hook, not Gabby's own shooting which led her to found Americans for Responsible Solutions—which has evolved into Giffords as we know it today. Although she was just in the beginning stages of recovering from her own injury caused by an act of gun violence, she could not stay on the sidelines in this important fight.
Giffords Law Center just released a report where it found that over **525** gun safety laws have been passed at the state level in the ten years since the Sandy Hook tragedy.
**29** states have passed laws that either enacted or strengthened background check laws.
**21** states have passed **86** significant laws to address community-based violence.
**37** states have passed **87** significant laws to make it harder for people who commit domestic abuse to access firearms.
**18** states and Washington, D.C. have passed laws that either created or strengthened extreme risk protection order laws.
**18** states have passed laws to make it harder for kids, teens, and young adults to access guns or prohibited guns on K–12 or higher education campuses.
Change doesn’t happen overnight. This is significant progress, but it took nearly a decade for us to get here. The work is still far from over, and Gabby has no plans to stop until we’ve reached a future in our nation where we no longer have the fear of gun violence looming over us.
[**So will you please donate $3 or any amount you can to Giffords PAC today so we can continue making progress in the fight to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic? Any amount you can contribute makes a difference and directly impacts our work to save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221217-1-15&t=1&akid=2881%2E3935704%2Er2TaTb)

clean_body: how did this happen? | Friend, We missed our final Mid-Month fundraising goal of 2022. Fortunately, my finance team called this morning and said that we can extend the deadline to the end of the week. ** Even $5, $15, or $25 makes a huge difference and helps our team to spread our conservative message and fight back against the Radical left. I know you've seen the news lately. Crime is rising rapidly across New York, the country, and at the border. Inflation is getting worse and worse. Families are struggling to protect their paychecks, speak out for their children at school, and feel safe in our communities. We NEED conservative leadership to turn this country, and our communities, around. It's no secret that the culture of our country is leaning more and more towards the left, and it's time for balance. Thank you, Rep. Nicole Malliotakis | A No-Nonsense Leader for Congress. Congresswoman Malliotakis is the daughter of immigrants, her father from Greece and her mother a Cuban exile of the Castro dictatorship. | | Our work to elect state Democrats isn’t over on Election Day. We couldn’t agree more with what President Obama has to say about protecting our democracy: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHB5jkBQMT5Sz3vkTzq7fEFr2WKW8RstoG07aCAJCnhvDIgUUBogxyJ8jHnJiihSImKt56MgldGJXrOVc6tAyjyfhIn8BbZw_CnJC3FKaCl5tXL0-OrbQQCLtb9JdWdjdpLjL1-EtfviAHRzkcD-zI6yvEeKn41xfabYVOmqmCoGfrCQHDXuccGSq_glzwGmK-Z50H3YjA03qmhL9lnMRCsbZfyhnLr_b1e7fUn0A30hb5Sh4oJ4YKQ0RURKDNTGk4kNdn98k2_1KqHBaUzwbvCqlMSMzftTm89S1pI_ywENI9PJHKkz_-ulkKU5ADFrP0Z-rgxvtzZ5b7EDr3vi3jfmF3558yr2wd4MKAYls49bIfMXy1Ukw0hDn4JnFzxl1hL1AzwgmdDK6ugL0vMeD5gMBlvMkJcyDXb5V803i_ba4/3s2/v2lJJdcFQ5eamui3m1Mvsw/h0/LXzguwvCEn2tLc9RHacPKcrh5lHdgObRmyeH-kLeJso) And here's the truth: One of the best ways to stay engaged and do your part is to activate **your 2023 DLCC membership!** Early investments were a huge part of why we won BIG in November. Your commitment today will help us build our movement and allow us to campaign competitively in as many states as possible in the next election. Becoming a member right now, before 2023 even starts, will help us build relationships with our in-state partners, conduct vital research to support our messaging and mobilization efforts, and strengthen our support programs in the states. **Over 2,599 Democrats have become official 2023 DLCC Members. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We're up against a media leviathan. Both right-wing media, and its wimpy, battered cousin, "both sides" mainstream media (MSM), so tilt the playing field in favor of those willing to lie, cheat or steal--who would do anything necessary to win and destroy the opposition--that it's hard to truly explain the breadth of it
body:
Here, there be dragons...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0dad3687-4443-4637-b640-3fdff6239c80/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I’ll get right to the point. **[I would be so grateful if you’d subscribe to my Blue Amp channel on Youtube, where we expose the lies and cruelty of The Right in America everyday, and counter-message so our side has a fighting chance.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4380bec-49a5-4733-a46a-861a40b2f0da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **We had a great election, we overcame so many structural barriers from voter suppression to Republican gerrymandering, or in layman's terms: Cheating.** **But we're up against a leviathan. Both right-wing media, and its wimpy, battered cousin, "both sides" mainstream media (MSM), so tilt the playing field in favor of those willing to lie, cheat or steal--who would do anything necessary to win and destroy the opposition--that it's hard to truly explain the breadth of it.** [PLEASE SUBSCRIBE TO THE BLUE AMP CHANNEL!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1616dfb3-3511-4dad-9493-2ab0956e3518/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Why do you think Kevin McCarthy has literally handed over control of the House--should he become Speaker--to Majorie Taylor Greene, with barely a peep from anyone? It's because right-wing media lies and both sides MSM refuse to tell the truth--which is that the Republican Party is in the grip of figures, who, if given the chance, will behave like Putin, Erdogan, Orban, MBS and other tyrants the world over. When courageous exceptions in our media step up and display their courage, they're punished. Supposed "free speech" warrior Elon Musk just banned journalists on Twitter for reporting on...him._ [**PLEASE SUBSCRIBE TO THE BLUE AMP CHANNEL!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0bc8a87-4fd5-4f7d-ad18-b1f93baf506f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I don't just know this academically. I debated then-NRA super-lobbyist Chris Cox in the pages of Tucker Carlson's Daily Caller (before I was banned). I debated Sean Hannity on FoxNews (before I was banned--seeing a pattern?) I was the paid "liberal"analyst at the uber-right-wing Sinclair Broadcast Network that owns local television stations around the country. I even wrote an expose of my experience there for the NY Times: I work within this leviathan when it's to our advantage, but realized **as our media has continued to get worse: [WE. MUST. START. AND. EXPAND. OUR. OWN. CHANNELS.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td93d97f5-e200-4883-8703-ef9b0ac85000/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [This is what I am doing at Youtube. I'm nearing 10,000 subscribers in 6 months](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta590f40c-73ec-416b-9ef6-67485adbb937/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) (i** _n fact, we are at over 9,900--less than 100 way!--so if just 100 members of the Blue Amp Action community who haven't yet subscribed, subcribe, we'll reach a new plateau of 10K_**), and **10K is a magical number on Youtube. It's one of the plateaus where the algorithm takes you more seriously, sharing your content with similar channels, thereby helping you grow much more quickly.** I hadn't planned [to do this](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1dfa828f-ac73-425d-8c18-c5048caba10e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). But I've always felt comfortable in front of a screen and have a knack for messaging. [We must fight this information war on every front, so I ask that you please subscribe. I’m confident you’ll be entertained, you’ll learn some things and you’ll become fired up even more to fight for our democracy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca545d0e-68b4-40f6-978d-e29d9cbab9f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for being on the Blue Amp Action List, so we can fight for our democracy together. [Now please do the same at the Blue Amp Channel, where it doesn't cost a cent to subscribe, and watching my videos only helps us fight and win the battles that MUST be fought.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0fa166cb-60f3-40b3-97aa-1c6bf81681a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** In solidarity, Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend urgent and timely progressive causes in the coming year.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1d3488c-c04e-4639-a353-698cee33df05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb47da882-8add-47de-8590-bf1decce6899/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Tammy Baldwin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
The Hill recently named my friend Tammy as one of the most vulnerable Senators up for re-election in 2024.
#
While our race for Senate didn't turn out the way we had hoped, our movement's fight for Wisconsin's working families is far from over.
**My friend Senator Tammy Baldwin is up for re-election in 2024, and The Hill already named Tammy one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024.** Republicans are certain to spend untold millions of dollars trying to defeat her, and it's critical that Tammy has our support from the very beginning. **
[**Can you split a contribution of $3 — or anything you can — between Leading the PAC and Tammy Baldwin and her campaign for re-election in Wisconsin? I wouldn't be asking if this weren't so important.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.6eTzLH&refcode=em221217-1-t2&t=1&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.x4dmTM&refcode=em221217-1-t2&t=20&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.k4m2Pj&refcode=em221217-1-t2&t=21&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.fL7mi8&refcode=em221217-1-t2&t=22&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.iOGUgr&refcode=em221217-1-t2&t=23&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.1UmEMz&refcode=em221217-1-t2&t=24&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.6eTzLH&refcode=em221217-1-t2&t=25&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
**The truth is that if we're going to defend the Democratic Senate majority in 2024, Tammy's seat is a must-win.**
As we saw in November, the margins in Wisconsin are razer-thin. That's why you can be sure that Mitch McConnell and his army of right-wing super PACs already have their targets set on Wisconsin. They spent tens of millions of dollars trying to defeat Tammy in 2018 — they’re going to spend even more in 2024.
It's so important that Tammy once again builds the kind of campaign that can fight back against the attacks and win as soon as possible. The quicker that she and her team are able to make crucial early investments and spread her message to voters in all corners of the state, the more likely that is to happen.
That's why I'm asking you today:
[**Can you split a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with my friend Tammy Baldwin and Leading the PAC so we can defend her seat and protect the Democratic Senate majority in 2024?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.6eTzLH&refcode=em221217-1-t2&t=26&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
With so much on the line right now, Wisconsin — and the nation — can't afford to lose Tammy's leadership in the U.S. Senate. Thanks in advance for adding your support today.
\- Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-baldwin-leading-the-pac.6eTzLH&refcode=em221217-1-t2&t=27&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4105%2E196590%2EvyRwI5)
Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201
