name: Adam Schiff
subject: Let’s talk about Trump and MAGA.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I want to share my thoughts and observations I've had from last month's midterms, along with the wider phenomenon of Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans' negative effect on our democracy which has only grown since 2016.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1465%2E5257348%2E52rbFe)
Derek,
Instead of the typical fundraising emails piling up in your inbox about important deadlines and goals, I wanted to try something a little different. And yes, before you go on, I write and approve all these emails.
I wanted to share my thoughts about last month's midterms, the danger that Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans have posed to our country and democracy since 2016, the encouraging signs of a return to normalcy, and the challenges going forward.
Since Trump first descended the golden escalator to announce his run for president, demonizing immigrants and polarizing the country, our democracy has had to weather a constant storm of assaults on its institutions. But since that time, and for three consecutive election cycles, Donald Trump and MAGA candidates across the country underperformed and lost — often spectacularly.
In 2018, the American people rejected Trump's MAGA candidates and flipped dozens of seats in the House. Then in 2020, Trump became the first president to lose re-election since George H.W. Bush.
The results this time around for Republicans and Trump were disastrous for both House and Senate Republicans — barely winning the House despite all the historical trends and thanks only to cynical red-state gerrymanders, and failing to defeat even a single incumbent Democrat in the Senate.
Some within the GOP leadership are finally beginning to recognize that Donald Trump is a loser, and as long as they attach their wagon to his — they will be losers too. **But let's not get ahead of ourselves, the harsh reality is: No matter whether Ron DeSantis or any other Trump wannabe is exploring a run for the GOP nomination, Trump still maintains the support of his extreme MAGA base and the Republican nomination is still his to lose.**
Even though this man has never won the popular vote, he is a threat that we cannot afford to underestimate, especially with razor-thin margins in Congress and control of both the House and Senate in 2024 a complete toss-up. We underestimated him in 2016, and that must never happen again.
With Kevin McCarthy’s hopes of becoming Speaker of the House pinned to the votes of Trump-loving House members like Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, Jim Jordan, and Lauren Boebert, he is continuing to exercise an outsized influence on our government.
There's no doubt in my mind that McCarthy will continue to be a leader who is completely beholden to the dangerous demands of Trumpism and MAGA politics. And that means they will continue to attack and demonize anyone who stands up to them. McCarthy has already vowed to remove me from the Intelligence Committee, a strictly political move to win the support of MAGA House members and part of a broader effort to neutralize oversight of their abuses.
So to continue to hold Trump and Republicans accountable, it is again left up to us to fight back against their attacks on the truth and our democracy.
**[That's why I am reaching out to you today. Will you give $5 to fuel our fight to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=dec2022_abs_em.Iqo_Wb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221217_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1465%2E5257348%2E52rbFe)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $5](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=dec2022_abs_em.hbyR4m&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221217_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1465%2E5257348%2E52rbFe)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=dec2022_abs_em.1CmCse&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221217_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1465%2E5257348%2E52rbFe)
---

clean_body: | I want to share my thoughts and observations I've had from last month's midterms, along with the wider phenomenon of Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans' negative effect on our democracy which has only grown since 2016. Derek, Instead of the typical fundraising emails piling up in your inbox about important deadlines and goals, I wanted to try something a little different. And yes, before you go on, I write and approve all these emails. I wanted to share my thoughts about last month's midterms, the danger that Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans have posed to our country and democracy since 2016, the encouraging signs of a return to normalcy, and the challenges going forward. Since Trump first descended the golden escalator to announce his run for president, demonizing immigrants and polarizing the country, our democracy has had to weather a constant storm of assaults on its institutions. But since that time, and for three consecutive election cycles, Donald Trump and MAGA candidates across the country underperformed and lost — often spectacularly. In 2018, the American people rejected Trump's MAGA candidates and flipped dozens of seats in the House. Then in 2020, Trump became the first president to lose re-election since George H.W. Bush. The results this time around for Republicans and Trump were disastrous for both House and Senate Republicans — barely winning the House despite all the historical trends and thanks only to cynical red-state gerrymanders, and failing to defeat even a single incumbent Democrat in the Senate. Some within the GOP leadership are finally beginning to recognize that Donald Trump is a loser, and as long as they attach their wagon to his — they will be losers too. But let's not get ahead of ourselves, the harsh reality is: No matter whether Ron DeSantis or any other Trump wannabe is exploring a run for the GOP nomination, Trump still maintains the support of his extreme MAGA base and the Republican nomination is still his to lose. Even though this man has never won the popular vote, he is a threat that we cannot afford to underestimate, especially with razor-thin margins in Congress and control of both the House and Senate in 2024 a complete toss-up. We underestimated him in 2016, and that must never happen again. With Kevin McCarthy’s hopes of becoming Speaker of the House pinned to the votes of Trump-loving House members like Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, Jim Jordan, and Lauren Boebert, he is continuing to exercise an outsized influence on our government. There's no doubt in my mind that McCarthy will continue to be a leader who is completely beholden to the dangerous demands of Trumpism and MAGA politics. And that means they will continue to attack and demonize anyone who stands up to them. McCarthy has already vowed to remove me from the Intelligence Committee, a strictly political move to win the support of MAGA House members and part of a broader effort to neutralize oversight of their abuses. So to continue to hold Trump and Republicans accountable, it is again left up to us to fight back against their attacks on the truth and our democracy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you for your friendship and support, — Adam 150 E. name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: my last speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=last_speech_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- This past Thursday, I stood on the floor of the U.S. House of Representatives, and delivered my final speech after 12 years in Congress. If you don't have time to watch, here are two big takeaways: 1) Had I known that standing up for the truth would cost me my job, friendships, and even my personal security, I would -- without hesitation -- do it all over again. 2) I'm not going anywhere. Our work together to defend democracy, stand up for the truth, and save our republic is just getting started. [](https://www.country1st.com/finalspeech?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=last_speech_nd&n=2) | [](https://www.country1st.com/finalspeech?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=last_speech_nd&n=3 "Watch the Speech") [Watch the Speech](https://www.country1st.com/finalspeech?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=last_speech_nd&n=3)
---
When I think back to my first run for Congress, I'd just come home from war, and truly believed American democracy was infallible. With all that generations before us had accomplished, I thought we'd be summiting new mountains instead of fighting in a ditch.
But we've gotten stuck, and if you're reading this email, you likely agree.
And it's no wonder our democracy isn't functioning when one party's megaphone echoes calls for civil war, and the other party verbally condemns yet financially supports the bad actors across the aisle. How does this road lead anywhere good? We know deep down that it can't.
BUT, the good news is there are off ramps to better roads; our future isn't written in stone. Country First is building the freeway to bring our parties and nation back to sanity, before it's too late.
It will be up to the Reasonable Majority -- the Americans looking for solutions, not lies -- to ditch apathy, to embrace hope, and to cling tightly to the great promise that is America.
We must not crumble under the gravity of this moment.
And while my time in Congress is coming to an end, I stand here renewing the promise I made a dozen years ago to leave this country a far better place than the one I inherited, not only for my son Christian, but for all of our kids and grandkids.
So let's do it, together.
Country First,
Adam
[](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRI-rk5pyYwx3MVaObW7hk1A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=last_speech_nd&n=4 "Wear Your Values") [Wear Your Values](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRI-rk5pyYwx3MVaObW7hk1A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=last_speech_nd&n=4)
---

body:
At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by nearly 30,000 votes... | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db166764fe454dfe94314547748ab9fd&_e=dF-uzs_8zAYL6HyYgxoSkMzr-ll-2rhGDSL7QV1cuuAKtUGtwulbEe44jBWHmOj32hM9bY2yMp4y1rC1cLF1b_5QKQ5z8pRhjNd_MUhYxOtdf0oUrRa6fFHC94kBIv1gAMVnB4-9EhmMwz3R21oV-V1TjmiRfIkvV-W4oGkQPJNZjp_W7M8SclpmYduCMfned9lmHedydnVSwbhUr4f3nT3_QHwrJ0h3RW0Gaa3avOyt3PFF78Yb7z5g8RpsbRSpbpXiLDe-h_4lZcY9gbDM-CdM23_8PdD9I_YE4R4NJJMqQrGOUVbLdEmAvUaxxhoMxMd8XjrEKGauew_LR7YlfXyWnpjndoLBX6lFbXDILx6bCnyjsEd09OWe3T6TlMYBw0dUlgB7B5JjNXgvbVU9vQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, I'm Claudia Tenney -- I'm a _small business owner_ , _Marine mom_ , and _conservative congresswoman_ from New York. I'm also heading up the _Election Integrity Caucus_ , a position I was uniquely qualified for due to the events surrounding my 2020 election race. I was involved in a **100-DAY LONG** post-election recount and legal battle. At midnight of election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by _**NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**_
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db166764fe454dfe94314547748ab9fd&_e=dF-uzs_8zAYL6HyYgxoSkMzr-ll-2rhGDSL7QV1cuuAKtUGtwulbEe44jBWHmOj32hM9bY2yMp4y1rC1cLF1b_5QKQ5z8pRhjNd_MUhYxOtdf0oUrRa6fFHC94kBIv1gAMVnB4-9EhmMwz3R21oV-V1TjmiRfIkvV-W4oGkQPJNZjp_W7M8SclpmYduCMfned9lmHedydnVSwbhUr4f3nT3_QHwrJ0h3RW0Gaa3avOyt3PFF78Yb7z5g8RpsbRSpXAcKuJ3boi7WYnUUPiefTrZ3XZRxruNliJQBl-Ej85iYuo4ZIHfzwCYCQHeGXP_o1Z13k1Yg4nwOn1d6qdanAI2keSOI0FMzT0poh2nR8xUwEG-ZJTrgaJ3veSCA-BIu0FaPLWdB-NdGudUJ8otqzQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Even with outstanding absentee ballots, my opponent's chance for victory was slim.
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db166764fe454dfe94314547748ab9fd&_e=dF-uzs_8zAYL6HyYgxoSkMzr-ll-2rhGDSL7QV1cuuAKtUGtwulbEe44jBWHmOj32hM9bY2yMp4y1rC1cLF1b_5QKQ5z8pRhjNd_MUhYxOtdf0oUrRa6fFHC94kBIv1gAMVnB4-9EhmMwz3R21oV-V1TjmiRfIkvV-W4oGkQPJNZjp_W7M8SclpmYduCMfned9lmHedydnVSwbhUr4f3nT3_QHwrJ0h3RW0Gaa3avOyt3PFF78Yb7z5g8RpsbRSph26ZQRxx0rRdYoNfPd-tevMPD6U_hSB1GsiAWb3el0BBMWh_FGkZmm2PKSCp1M3LKcXrbQE93xzGltY3Zhbgr6EI4TFjdOpAd6e-ZcYkoO9uV8sb96IWoc0rF9VO6mWsOUm6fllkZp6J4jItWtxYNA%3D%3D)
---
| Over the next 90 days, we fought against a team of lawyers who abused the legal system and tried to cherry-pick ballots and play games in NY-22. They pulled out every shady tactic in the book to try to push my opponent ahead.
---
| | Eventually, the New York Supreme Court got involved and conducted a thorough, transparent, and fair review to all parties. **After every ballot had been scrutinized and every legal vote had counted, I was declared and certified the winner by a slim** _**123**_**votes! ****

****That didn 't stop my opponent or Nancy Pelosi from trying to overturn the results of my race and undermine me at every turn. ** I decided that day that I never want what happened to me to happen to another candidate again, I was going to lead on reforming, securing, and auditing our election system.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db166764fe454dfe94314547748ab9fd&_e=dF-uzs_8zAYL6HyYgxoSkMzr-ll-2rhGDSL7QV1cuuAKtUGtwulbEe44jBWHmOj32hM9bY2yMp4y1rC1cLF1b_5QKQ5z8pRhjNd_MUhYxOtdf0oUrRa6fFHC94kBIv1gAMVnB4-9EhmMwz3R21oV-V1TjmiRfIkvV-W4oGkQPJNZjp_W7M8SclpmYduCMfned9lmHedydnVSwbhUr4f3nT3_QHwrJ0h3RW0Gaa3avOyt3PFF78Yb7z5g8RpsbRSpLghqpPNVM9MRwt3nRJyH5u6tSNWshAKzVLDI2T6CtYa-uL1RPky6G_SC1kGZFnLcl4uFzlm9DqUYdjENyYDE7FegJ_MlZ6Q3AOz66QQlY1I6_7OIyAu435JGZ94Dcp_aBca22Xfk4d4xMrwBYpnicw%3D%3D)
---
That means implementing common-sense reforms such as: ** ➡️ Mandatory Voter IDs** ** ➡️ Banning Ballot Harvesting** ** ➡️ Preventing Unsolicited Ballots** And foremost, ensuring our elections are: **FREE ✅ FAIR ✅ACCURATE ✅ TRANSPARENT ✅** For leading this fight, I've been constantly attacked: **Slandered by the Radical Left ...** **Smeared by the Mainstream Media...** **Shadowbanned by Big Tech ...****

** But I will not be intimidated. I will not be silenced. And I will never back down. That's because I'm fighting to take back New York, I'm fighting to save America, and I'm fighting for you, Friend! **Friend, they wouldn 't be attacking me if I weren't effective in this fight--**[**a fight that I hope you 'll consider supporting with a small donation today!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db166764fe454dfe94314547748ab9fd&_e=dF-uzs_8zAYL6HyYgxoSkMzr-ll-2rhGDSL7QV1cuuAKtUGtwulbEe44jBWHmOj32hM9bY2yMp4y1rC1cLF1b_5QKQ5z8pRhjNd_MUhYxOtdf0oUrRa6fFHC94kBIv1gAMVnB4-9EhmMwz3R21oV-V1TjmiRfIkvV-W4oGkQPJNZjp_W7M8SclpmYduCMfned9lmHedydnVSwbhUr4f3nT3_QHwrJ0h3RW0Gaa3avOyt3PFF78Yb7z5g8RpsbRSpF7hVlYEiQbfPVR6jPEce2canBOyax7o2sL85SbnFen4POSPxsotuXJEqqEEdBDFaLS6wHKeRZMZe6KKL3ghb4OKC6fNRxrVAxb5J2FTGRiKn_eBseARwZDJb4-G71Rbf_vl-peq2q4fG7ZGF-4JPpQ%3D%3D) Thank you, Claudia Tenney
---

I'm also heading up the Election Integrity Caucus , a position I was uniquely qualified for due to the events surrounding my 2020 election race. I was involved in a 100-DAY LONG post-election recount and legal battle. At midnight of election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by NEARLY 30,000 VOTES! | | | Even with outstanding absentee ballots, my opponent's chance for victory was slim. | | | Over the next 90 days, we fought against a team of lawyers who abused the legal system and tried to cherry-pick ballots and play games in NY-22. They pulled out every shady tactic in the book to try to push my opponent ahead. | | Eventually, the New York Supreme Court got involved and conducted a thorough, transparent, and fair review to all parties. After every ballot had been scrutinized and every legal vote had counted, I was declared and certified the winner by a slim 123votes! That didn 't stop my opponent or Nancy Pelosi from trying to overturn the results of my race and undermine me at every turn. I decided that day that I never want what happened to me to happen to another candidate again, I was going to lead on reforming, securing, and auditing our election system. That means implementing common-sense reforms such as: ➡️ Mandatory Voter IDs ➡️ Banning Ballot Harvesting ➡️ Preventing Unsolicited Ballots And foremost, ensuring our elections are: FREE ✅ FAIR ✅ACCURATE ✅ TRANSPARENT ✅ For leading this fight, I've been constantly attacked: Slandered by the Radical Left ... Smeared by the Mainstream Media... Shadowbanned by Big Tech ... But I will not be intimidated. I will not be silenced. And I will never back down. That's because I'm fighting to take back New York, I'm fighting to save America, and I'm fighting for you, Friend! Friend, they wouldn 't be attacking me if I weren't effective in this fight-- Thank you, Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Since the _Moore v. Harper_ oral argument in front of the U.S. Supreme Court, news media predict that lawmakers are hoping it will give them “free rein to do whatever they want, whenever they want, when it comes to drawing congressional district lines” -- but advocates like us are standing strong to make sure that legislators’ hunger for power doesn’t gnaw away at voters’ rights.

In states like Ohio, lawmakers are awaiting the outcome of _Moore v. Harper_ to use the decision as leverage to undermine voting accessibility. Their tactics aim to diminish the work we’ve done together across this country to help ensure fair representation, fair elections, and all voices are heard in courts and at the ballot box.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56096797/383858737/742344613?refcode=20221217_AOTL_F_nllgraphic_Actives&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmODIzNmNjLTRkN2UtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0XeAe-KHRVlq-NwfC2R62NKcQ9zL6MLSoih2qFy21PE=)
---
Team -- it's clear that these lawmakers want absolute power for personal gain. Our work continues to stand behind the power of the people and the importance of advocating for voters in places like North Carolina and Ohio.

**We must put an end to the corrupt ideals that fail to strengthen our democracy and those ideals that disregard the people in this country that prevail over us -- no more lawless lawmakers.[Make a donation today and support our work as we begin this next chapter.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56096798/383858738/742344613?refcode=20221217_AOTL_F_nllgraphic_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmODIzNmNjLTRkN2UtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0XeAe-KHRVlq-NwfC2R62NKcQ9zL6MLSoih2qFy21PE=)**

\-- Emuni Sanderson
Mobilization Strategist

clean_body: No Lawless Lawmakers. | Team -- the fair maps and democracy movement is trailblazing forward. The next chapter of the our movement begins now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Since the Moore v. Harper oral argument in front of the U.S. Supreme Court, news media predict that lawmakers are hoping it will give them “free rein to do whatever they want, whenever they want, when it comes to drawing congressional district lines” -- but advocates like us are standing strong to make sure that legislators’ hunger for power doesn’t gnaw away at voters’ rights. In states like Ohio, lawmakers are awaiting the outcome of Moore v. Harper to use the decision as leverage to undermine voting accessibility. Their tactics aim to diminish the work we’ve done together across this country to help ensure fair representation, fair elections, and all voices are heard in courts and at the ballot box. = Team -- it's clear that these lawmakers want absolute power for personal gain. Our work continues to stand behind the power of the people and the importance of advocating for voters in places like North Carolina and Ohio. We must put an end to the corrupt ideals that fail to strengthen our democracy and those ideals that disregard the people in this country that prevail over us -- no more lawless lawmakers.= \-- Emuni Sanderson Mobilization Strategist All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Derek -- Democrats nationwide made enormous progress this year: passing critical legislation like the _Inflation Reduction Act_ and the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , flipping gubernatorial and state legislature seats from red to blue across the country, and holding our Senate majority. That's thanks to this grassroots team. Believe me when I say _**we could not have accomplished what we did without dedicated Democratic Party members.**_ We’re preparing right now to continue fighting back against the GOP and to elect Democrats, but we need you to make a commitment to supporting our party. **Democratic Party members have helped make incredible progress this year. clean_body: Investments right now make a huge difference in funding our party’s work. Everything we do is only possible because of grassroots donations. | | Derek -- Democrats nationwide made enormous progress this year: passing critical legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act and the Respect for Marriage Act , flipping gubernatorial and state legislature seats from red to blue across the country, and holding our Senate majority. That's thanks to this grassroots team. Believe me when I say we could not have accomplished what we did without dedicated Democratic Party members. We’re preparing right now to continue fighting back against the GOP and to elect Democrats, but we need you to make a commitment to supporting our party. Democratic Party members have helped make incredible progress this year. With less than two weeks until the new year, I’m personally asking you to chip in $10 and become an official Democratic member for 2023. Investments right now make a huge difference in supporting our party’s work. Everything we do -- from voter protection efforts to organizing on-the-ground in communities all over the country -- is only possible because of grassroots donations. I’m coming to you directly, Derek: Thank you again for helping to build the strongest Democratic Party in history. I hope to see your name on our mailing list when we ship these out. Jaime Jaime Harrison Chair Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Jason Miyares
subject: victims FIRST, criminals LAST
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
We’re standing up for families and shutting down overzealous criminals.| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=efed6949eba240aea5ad3300a65f901b&_t=QcoYgpRKtcoNjSRCRTw9zLvBlUfAVhcbw6Gwoo6xramer0YWfg9vLuGu4TZ8Huy0oaDGHLYE1m1eHA4KrPeVLx9cVfafNzJree-uAN8c6lc%3D)_.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=efed6949eba240aea5ad3300a65f901b&_e=YM0SaQEKfhCBD8G1vsYDO8rwzxxlhCCf3Pj0qaxBW4KgTLb95qc_9PemLR3K9Mu444RMX4AJxa0P1rat78hXL27AV6MAO1JgEbAzb7G4zYisjYRZCN-3DAC5GQaK5IWY6I6nVwrN-fQGDpILw67R8uljkhu-4SVxHKtut5LaydFAXNNriSEgjALy1Dqgy8AS4fW2D6K5rZf3F0V7IHv7_aSvotFoRs01VNLS3ySKwhTITYGm-nN80oJsn9B5eU1BzMrYDcEFdF3hk_f1yoOm2bBubRAbPI6f3NxHR8LPK7MTQBWQ-nvU-MNXFCXtFOIvp3y5bz9vpoJrEv2Ouizna6bFozkT9oYBJb-qHBEV5MqSIMhJHLO53LD8RPRo8U4z)
---
Peter, When Virginians voted in 2021, they agreed with me and voted for a change. They voted to walk away from the status quo and return to a core belief we all share: _the desire to live in a safe community._ **When I took office, I made it clear that a new sheriff is in town.**** ** I made it clear that we won’t stand for lawlessness and rampant crime. I made it clear that Virginia would be a place for thriving families, not overzealous criminals.
---
[**STAND FOR LAW AND ORDER**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=efed6949eba240aea5ad3300a65f901b&_e=YM0SaQEKfhCBD8G1vsYDO8rwzxxlhCCf3Pj0qaxBW4KgTLb95qc_9PemLR3K9Mu444RMX4AJxa0P1rat78hXL27AV6MAO1JgEbAzb7G4zYisjYRZCN-3DAC5GQaK5IWY6I6nVwrN-fQGDpILw67R8uljkhu-4SVxHKtut5LaydFAXNNriSEgjALy1Dqgy8AS4fW2D6K5rZf3F0V7IHv7_aSvotFoRs01VNLS3ySKwhRAeMl5d94nTGrkScw1pDFpWWYIvI1OPCHR7FdJWMW6stmbMJyejVrTF2zgx8uAXsktucnNHdzRSjAsR0fnwBudeTdC2GCMGDsEGf3FRKXLBBQd8FTDpdXLLf7SGkUbceXpNHU9kRO0lCaN40yMiaXa)
---
**As my first year as Attorney General comes to a close, I’m so proud of the positive developments we’ve made in public safety and accountability standards throughout the Commonwealth. **
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=efed6949eba240aea5ad3300a65f901b&_e=YM0SaQEKfhCBD8G1vsYDO8rwzxxlhCCf3Pj0qaxBW4KgTLb95qc_9PemLR3K9Mu444RMX4AJxa0P1rat78hXL27AV6MAO1JgEbAzb7G4zYisjYRZCN-3DAC5GQaK5IWY6I6nVwrN-fQGDpILw67R8uljkhu-4SVxHKtut5LaydFAXNNriSEgjALy1Dqgy8AS4fW2D6K5rZf3F0V7IHv7_aSvotFoRs01VNLS3ySKwhQMTclUYuQUHr-2oTX6CrOuQUEs3vZ3ylv0nKz5_fsb58AefrJ13a-5zqT4eSGHwnLi5oRgSG9dqJgO2HOOYirG00rQFx3GVSNUQ674Yh7WL4nPj3zcSqjtmRoF3Qi5FpinxU1tfdhpZuOToWwSjtf9)
---
[**JOIN JASON MIYARES**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=efed6949eba240aea5ad3300a65f901b&_e=YM0SaQEKfhCBD8G1vsYDO8rwzxxlhCCf3Pj0qaxBW4KgTLb95qc_9PemLR3K9Mu444RMX4AJxa0P1rat78hXL27AV6MAO1JgEbAzb7G4zYisjYRZCN-3DAC5GQaK5IWY6I6nVwrN-fQGDpILw67R8uljkhu-4SVxHKtut5LaydFAXNNriSEgjALy1Dqgy8AS4fW2D6K5rZf3F0V7IHv7_aSvotFoRs01VNLS3ySKwhTt9wItNvnsNK1kvxmk5e_bxU8J8cym4CHwznpmvHWViZhfiYESvnEUzimeqYSyHAAjXjea_DECSYNaRObcSwUcdWWfPcVuLTLzT1XXtaPQNivccWGrYzkpSb0FDgaVoapYOH4Y2kZKQcEyE273ZTo8)
---
**Peter, we’ve spent the last year working to undo the criminal-first, victim-last policies of the previous administration.** We took on the liberal Commonwealth Attorneys that refused to prosecute those that broke the law. We cracked down on violent crime while supporting our law enforcement officers. And we provided resources to those that fell victim to criminals that took advantage of the previous administration’s soft-on-crime policies.
---
My commitment and passion for upholding the rule of law is about something bigger that isn’t talked about enough. **Peter, without law and order, the American Dream will die.** 50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back.
---
[**KEEP THE AMERICAN DREAM ALIVE**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=efed6949eba240aea5ad3300a65f901b&_e=YM0SaQEKfhCBD8G1vsYDO8rwzxxlhCCf3Pj0qaxBW4KgTLb95qc_9PemLR3K9Mu444RMX4AJxa0P1rat78hXL27AV6MAO1JgEbAzb7G4zYisjYRZCN-3DAC5GQaK5IWY6I6nVwrN-fQGDpILw67R8uljkhu-4SVxHKtut5LaydFAXNNriSEgjALy1Dqgy8AS4fW2D6K5rZf3F0V7IHv7_aSvotFoRs01VNLS3ySKwhRfHtJb3aC8EMZLkSWeRgJST9bdKdY5vYp7RrydFk5PEOXabdYv-hkAdbkFzMY46cSnY50R0PQbyOF2PoXJtzmbErEgYiskMLkaILoOQjyJwpXpEoSGILK4i1J9kfdjL8xxC-gt3dO0vN7ZiHC7r0bS)
---
By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American.
Because of her courage, I went to school... and became a prosecutor... and served in the Virginia House of Delegates... and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=efed6949eba240aea5ad3300a65f901b&_e=YM0SaQEKfhCBD8G1vsYDO8rwzxxlhCCf3Pj0qaxBW4KgTLb95qc_9PemLR3K9Mu444RMX4AJxa0P1rat78hXL27AV6MAO1JgEbAzb7G4zYisjYRZCN-3DAC5GQaK5IWY6I6nVwrN-fQGDpILw67R8uljkhu-4SVxHKtut5LaydFAXNNriSEgjALy1Dqgy8AS4fW2D6K5rZf3F0V7IHv7_aSvotFoRs01VNLS3ySKwhRx74Js17oqGs_W_fQuKjCQlbBlxRnnyoGLbXXjIDz2ke41kKa8qEocyKatzI2vwzb11KeyrbeOz_4EcFPXJm_xGdLSGK5-Ix2ZoLYUoOqNJAQVIuOHO0CE-AK6R41mY-GQPfsnPX1-AJdJpW6dw8UN)
---
Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms. **Peter, I’ve made it my life’s mission to crack down on violent criminals and protect our freedoms. We’ve made significant progress here in the Commonwealth, but there’s still more work to be done. ** _[**_Will you join our movement to make Virginia safe and free again?_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=efed6949eba240aea5ad3300a65f901b&_e=YM0SaQEKfhCBD8G1vsYDO8rwzxxlhCCf3Pj0qaxBW4KgTLb95qc_9PemLR3K9Mu444RMX4AJxa0P1rat78hXL27AV6MAO1JgEbAzb7G4zYisjYRZCN-3DAC5GQaK5IWY6I6nVwrN-fQGDpILw67R8uljkhu-4SVxHKtut5LaydFAXNNriSEgjALy1Dqgy8AS4fW2D6K5rZf3F0V7IHv7_aSvotFoRs01VNLS3ySKwhSpNQ5IHHt5g8QLL4acbofBQk_2bXetVYksEc5f6vx0fuOxoTuv9S8OD2HK3FT_8L74aGG_Nv9p1E-RU7q6TXjkAefP_dB4tH2DI2jCfmHAcGXBQ_lYJ5CPUAp-efGkatorvs-YUyvH7Vvl7Q-Y1gsG)_

clean_body: We’re standing up for families and shutting down overzealous criminals.| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this . Peter, When Virginians voted in 2021, they agreed with me and voted for a change. They voted to walk away from the status quo and return to a core belief we all share: the desire to live in a safe community. When I took office, I made it clear that a new sheriff is in town. I made it clear that we won’t stand for lawlessness and rampant crime. I made it clear that Virginia would be a place for thriving families, not overzealous criminals. As my first year as Attorney General comes to a close, I’m so proud of the positive developments we’ve made in public safety and accountability standards throughout the Commonwealth. Peter, we’ve spent the last year working to undo the criminal-first, victim-last policies of the previous administration. We took on the liberal Commonwealth Attorneys that refused to prosecute those that broke the law. We cracked down on violent crime while supporting our law enforcement officers. And we provided resources to those that fell victim to criminals that took advantage of the previous administration’s soft-on-crime policies. My commitment and passion for upholding the rule of law is about something bigger that isn’t talked about enough. Peter, without law and order, the American Dream will die. 50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school... and became a prosecutor... and served in the Virginia House of Delegates... and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms. Peter, I’ve made it my life’s mission to crack down on violent criminals and protect our freedoms. We’ve made significant progress here in the Commonwealth, but there’s still more work to be done. Thank you, Jason MiyaresVirginia Attorney General | | | . | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |

name: Gary Peters, DSCC Chair
subject: a personal thank you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
Friend,

This month, Democrats defied the odds and secured a truly historic win: We won Georgia's crucial runoff election and expanded our Senate majority! It was a long road to this moment, and I am so grateful for your support throughout it all.

It might be hard to remember now, but heading into this cycle, things were looking challenging for Democrats. To be frank, there were not very many people who predicted that Democrats would defend, but also expand our majority.

**But, friend, I was one of those people – and that's exactly why I agreed to serve as chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee.**

When I won my reelection campaign in 2020, I saw the power of this incredible grassroots team firsthand. I saw folks like you chip in donations time and time again. I saw you make hundreds of thousands of phone calls to voters. I saw you rally unprecedented grassroots support for our candidates. **And I saw how you never stopped fighting and never, ever gave up hope.**

I knew that with this team by our side, we could defy the odds and win in 2022. So we got to work – and our efforts paid off.

**[Our early investments played a critical role in allowing us to not only defend but expand our Senate majority, and they’ll be key to victory again in 2024. That’s why I’m personally asking you to help continue this fight: Will you chip in $5 now to start laying the groundwork to protect our Senate majority again in 2024?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221217-GaryPetersDSCCChair-PetersThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221217-GaryPetersDSCCChair-PetersThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=9198%2E9716520%2EruYbXg)

The victories that we celebrated this year were truly incredible: In Nevada, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto, America's first Latina senator, won one of the closest races in the country. Next door in Arizona, Sen. Mark Kelly secured a resounding victory. Up north, Sen. Maggie Hassan's hard-fought campaign kept the Granite State blue. John Fetterman even _FLIPPED_ a seat blue in Pennsylvania. And, Sen. Raphael Warnock's victory in Georgia has further solidified our majority.

I am so very proud of this team. Together, we truly made history. Serving as your DSCC chair through such a pivotal election has been the honor of my life. **Thank you for trusting me, for having my back every time, and for believing in a better future.**

**[I know this team is only just getting started, so I hope you will stick with us and pitch in $5 to help defend our Democratic majority again.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221217-GaryPetersDSCCChair-PetersThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221217-GaryPetersDSCCChair-PetersThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=9198%2E9716520%2EruYbXg)

I cannot wait to see the progress we achieve going forward.

Gratefully yours,

Senator Gary Peters
DSCC Chair

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221217-GaryPetersDSCCChair-PetersThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221217-GaryPetersDSCCChair-PetersThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=9198%2E9716520%2EruYbXg)

| Gary Peters is a U.S. Senator from Michigan, former Lieutenant Commander in the Navy Reserve, and Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee. Gary is fighting to support middle-class families, grow good-paying jobs, protect reproductive rights, and defend the Senate from Mitch McConnell.
| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221217-GaryPetersDSCCChair-PetersThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221217-GaryPetersDSCCChair-PetersThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=9198%2E9716520%2EruYbXg)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Did you see Bernie’s email?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We need to make sure you saw Bernie Sanders’ email from Thursday! He
announced the official launch of our 2024 Candidate Recruitment Campaign.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123430?refcode=em20221217-26605&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26605%2E1203867%2EgY9R6C ]Will you join Bernie Sanders in helping us find the next progressive
fighters to join the Squad in Congress by making a contribution right now?

Then, please take a moment to read Bernie’s full email below and join our
efforts to transform the Democratic Party.

Thank you,
Team JD

--------Forwarded message below from Bernie Sanders--------

Peter,

Over just a few years, Justice Democrats has recruited and helped elect a
strong, diverse, working-class slate of progressives to the U.S. House
that includes Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, and
Summer Lee.

But now is not the time to just sit back and relax. We need to elect even
more progressive champions to fight for issues that match the scale of the
crises we face, such as Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, fighting
obscene levels of wealth and income inequality, getting big money out of
politics, and more.

But here's the truth,
Peter: It takes tremendous
effort and resources to recruit working-class primary challengers and help
them win. Justice Democrats just launched their 2024 candidate recruitment
efforts, and they need to raise $120,000 in the next 72 hours to take on
the establishment in Congress. That’s why I'm asking:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123430?refcode=em20221217-26605&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26605%2E1203867%2EgY9R6C ]Will you join me in supporting Justice Democrats today with a
$3 contribution? Every donation will help recruit more
progressive candidates to challenge the political establishment and
corporate elite. This is important.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123430?refcode=em20221217-26605&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26605%2E1203867%2EgY9R6C ]Contribute $3

The unfortunate reality is that it takes an incredible amount of money to
run campaigns from start to finish, especially for progressive candidates
challenging entrenched, corporate-backed incumbents. That's why it's so
extraordinary what Justice Democrats has built over the last few years,
with people chipping in what they can afford to take on the billionaire
class that wants to protect the status quo.

The truth is that we are up against some very powerful special interests
that have been at war with the working class for decades. I'm talking
about Wall Street, the pharmaceutical industry, the health insurance
industry, the fossil fuel industry, the military industrial complex, the
private prison industrial complex and large corporations who continue to
exploit their employees while they bring in record profits.

Progressive candidates recruited by Justice Democrats in the months ahead
will be up against corporate-backed incumbents with unlimited sums of
money. And you can bet that right-wing groups like AIPAC will be doing
everything they can to stop our movement. AIPAC spent millions of dollars
against Nina Turner, Summer Lee, and Jessica Cisneros because they are
afraid of strong, progressive women of color who are fighting for the
working class.

To find the next class of strong progressive candidates to run for
Congress and advance our fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal,
racial justice, and an economy that works for everyone, Justice Democrats
needs your help today.

The Democratic Party must become the party that stands up for the working
class of this country. And we can make that happen by electing more
progressives who will fight for working people to Congress and
transforming the Democratic Party from the inside out.

I hope you will join me today in supporting the Justice Democrats 2024
candidate recruitment launch. Justice Democrats relies solely on
grassroots donations to recruit and elect the strongest possible
working-class progressive candidates to Congress, and that's why I have to
ask:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123430?refcode=em20221217-26605&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=26605%2E1203867%2EgY9R6C ]Can you chip in $3 to fund the Justice Democrats
candidate recruitment efforts and help them reach their $120,000
fundraising goal? I would not ask if it were not so important.

Your contribution today will give Justice Democrats the early funds they
need to take on the political establishment and elect more progressive
candidates. Thank you for chipping in today if you can afford it.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123430?refcode=em20221217-26605&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=26605%2E1203867%2EgY9R6C ]Contribute

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=26605%2E1203867%2EgY9R6C ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=26605%2E1203867%2EgY9R6C ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221217-26605-footer&t=1026&refcode2=26605_1203867_gY9R6C&akid=26605%2E1203867%2EgY9R6C

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=26605%2E1203867%2EgY9R6C

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

To find the next class of strong progressive candidates to run for Congress and advance our fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, racial justice, and an economy that works for everyone, Justice Democrats needs your help today. The Democratic Party must become the party that stands up for the working class of this country. And we can make that happen by electing more progressives who will fight for working people to Congress and transforming the Democratic Party from the inside out. I hope you will join me today in supporting the Justice Democrats 2024 candidate recruitment launch. Justice Democrats relies solely on grassroots donations to recruit and elect the strongest possible working-class progressive candidates to Congress, and that's why I have to ask: [ ]Can you chip in $3 to fund the Justice Democrats candidate recruitment efforts and help them reach their $120,000 fundraising goal? I would not ask if it were not so important. Your contribution today will give Justice Democrats the early funds they need to take on the political establishment and elect more progressive candidates. Thank you for chipping in today if you can afford it. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders [ ]Contribute Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zelenko=20Freedom?=
subject: Our Freedom Depends on You
body:
| | | Peter, our country has been taken over by forces that absolutely despise us and we all know that. The sad part is that very few are actually fighting back.**Medical tyranny** will go down in history as the issue of our lifetime... and if we don’t fight back against it, we will see how it affects the generations ahead.When COVID hit, we saw a new world order that had been years in the making begin to take shape. Digital ID cards, vaccine passports, tracking at unprecedented levels - it all came together to RUIN our lives!
---
| [FIGHT BACK AGAINST MEDICAL TYRANNY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5492891033&e=fdefed58de)
---
Dr. Zev Zelenko was one of the lone voices who stepped up right from day one of this medically induced tyranny and called it out. His "Zelenko Protocol" saved millions and millions of Americans. He was one of the leaders of the medical freedom movement, showing us how truly important our bodily autonomy was.
With Zev’s passing, the Zelenko Freedom Foundation has been busy establishing the fundamentals per the IRS code, so that we may accept donations from people who want to support the vision and mission of Dr. Zelenko’s legacy. His legacy and the work he was doing to end medical tyranny **MUST** carry on - and that is our job.
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=327d83b9de&e=fdefed58de)
| [HELP US TAKE BACK AMERICA!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=be99569ade&e=fdefed58de)
---
We are excited to report that the important work of the Zelenko Freedom Foundation continues! The foundation is the world’s bridge to the future. Dr. Zelenko had a clear vision for a more God centric world, true freedom for humanity, and through the foundation we will deliver and honor the legacy of our hero, Dr. Zev Zelenko.The Z Freedom Foundation has THREE key goals:

1. **INCUBATE:** Find the next generation of biomedical technology that Big Pharma ignores in their quest for profit over your health.
2. **EDUCATE:** Educate the public about how to protect their health and fight for their rights as patients and consumers.
3. **SHARE:** Share valuable information with the world that is often being suppressed by Silicon Valley oligarchs, corrupt corporate interests and incompetent government officials.

Nearly every major foundation worked **AGAINST** our medical autonomy and came down on the side of tyrants during the last two years - now is our time to STOP that and build something **FOR US and BY US**.**The purpose of the Zelenko Freedom Foundation is to find the next brave generation of medical professionals committed to keeping their patients safe without doing the bidding of big pharma.**
| [HELP US SAVE THE NATION!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d242c2d0c6&e=fdefed58de)
---
Your support of our mission is what will make us successful. Both of us have decided to devote our lives to carrying on Zev's mission. We must NEVER allow our medical autonomy to be stripped from us again. We must never become a nation of medical tyranny... AND WE ARE ALREADY WELL ON OUR WAY!Together, we can stand up against the powers trying to destroy us and ensure that big pharma's power over us comes to an end. **It is possible, but it is a movement that must come from the people. We can't wait on others, we must do it ourselves.****Your donations will jumpstart our work and help us to truly affect change in the medical freedom space. We can’t do this without you — please click below and donate today!**
| [SUPPORT THE Z FREEDOM FOUNDATION!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3e2cbbb04b&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you and God Bless you,
Kevin Jenkins & Ann Vandersteel, Co-Chairs
Zelenko Freedom Foundation
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

American Conservatives United1900 Market StPhiladelphia, PA 19103

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=873d74cf40&e=fdefed58de&c=874c200cb2) or [unsubscribe](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=873d74cf40&e=fdefed58de&c=874c200cb2)

body:
Let's take a moment to reflect, rejuvenate, and celebrate our wins.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56093667/383841758/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221217_f_eoywrapped_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDgzYWIwYy0zMDdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvM4mpmT_RZt2Ekn9JJHGnz5pjRxlg6_mnAsZyFbKj8=&emci=35aa3906-307e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=2483ab0c-307e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=1037277)

| | It’s been quite the year. On behalf of the entire Fair Fight Team, we want to thank you for your incredible dedication and support in the fight for free and fair elections in 2022. **You’ve been with us every step of the way.** Together, we’ve been on the frontlines helping make every voter’s voice heard. Together, we’ve invested our time, money, and energy to protect our democracy — because our vote is our power. And together, we’ve led with determination, resilience, and a whole lot of positivity. As we reflect on everything we’ve been able to accomplish, we’d like to take a moment to share some of our victories this year — made possible because of your commitment to this work. **Take a look at our 2022 Fair Fight Wrapped!** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56093668/383841759/229506340?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221217_f_eoywrapped_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDgzYWIwYy0zMDdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvM4mpmT_RZt2Ekn9JJHGnz5pjRxlg6_mnAsZyFbKj8=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56093669/383841760/229506340?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221217_f_eoywrapped_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDgzYWIwYy0zMDdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvM4mpmT_RZt2Ekn9JJHGnz5pjRxlg6_mnAsZyFbKj8=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56093670/383841761/229506340?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221217_f_eoywrapped_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDgzYWIwYy0zMDdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvM4mpmT_RZt2Ekn9JJHGnz5pjRxlg6_mnAsZyFbKj8=)
---
We’re proud of all that we achieved in 2022, but our work doesn’t end here. We’re gearing up for all the crucial voting rights fights that lie ahead in 2023, 2024, and beyond — and we know that with you by our side, we’ll rise to the challenge.
**For today, let’s take a moment to reflect, rejuvenate, and celebrate these wins — because we all played a role in making them possible.**
Thank you for everything.
In solidarity,
The Fair Fight Team

name: Richard Walker
subject: Medicine Now vs. Then
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087007:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)

Hello Peter,

Back in the day, people knew their doctors, and their doctors knew them.

That's because doctors spent time with their patients, really got to know them as individuals, and how best to care for them.

But for all of our advancements in medicine over the years, this is something we've lost.

**Doctors are no longer taught to treat their patients as individuals. **

Instead, the prevailing culture, both on- and off-campus, forces doctors to treat their patients according to checkboxes on a form.

BRI is working to change this by educating medical students about positive, proven healthcare policies that preserve and protect the fundamental doctor-patient medical relationship.

You can help us bring back the doctor-patient relationship to medicine and eliminate woke culture from medical schools.

[_**Please support the Benjamin Rush Institute to help us establish a presence in medical schools. Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087007:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)

BRI chapters host meaningful, engaging educational events like lectures, debates, panel discussions, movie screenings, journal clubs, and conferences in medical schools.

Our goal is to empower students to stand up against the push for social justice rather than science so we can bring back the doctor/patient relationship.

All medical students are enrolled in medical school to care for patients and play a positive role in healthcare and society. But once they graduate from medical school and complete a grueling residency, they become frustrated after finding their work hindered by significant regulatory interference.

You and I need to show medical students there is an alternative to socialized, over-regulated healthcare taught in medical schools.

**It really is up to you and me to improve healthcare affordability, accessibility, and quality. **

But we'll never achieve those goals unless we restore and protect the fulfilling patient-doctor relationship.

[_**Your generous donation helps BRI educate medical students, re-focus healthcare policy on inviolate doctor-patient autonomy, and create a lasting legacy of healthcare freedom and medical excellence. Click here to donate to the Benjamin Rush Institute today >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087007:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)

The future of medicine - _our medical students_ - must be educated on how today's policies, laws, and regulations will affect the future of medicine and their profession.

**No public policy issue impacts American lives more profoundly than healthcare. **

And yet, students rarely learn about healthcare policy in a balanced way.

Today's students are presented with solutions permeated by the assumption that government rightly must play a predominant role.

But BRI can't do it alone, Peter.

Can you send your support by clicking on any link below?

[_**Give $10 >> **_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087008:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)
[_**Give $25 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087009:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)
[_**Give $50 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087010:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)
[_**Give $100 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087011:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)
[_**Give $250 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087012:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)
[_**Give $500 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087013:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)
[_**Give $1,000 >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087014:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)
[_**Give Any Amount >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087007:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)

Your support has never been more critical to medical education nor vital for BRI to continue thriving.

We don't accept ANY government checks, loans, grants, or handouts to avoid entangling alliances. _We rely 100% on your support to continue these important programs_.

**You are making a real difference by supporting our student members in the medical field.**

[_**Will you please give a generous gift to the Benjamin Rush Institute today? Click here to show your support >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62087007:6qd3CGGEN:m:1:3334294963:B4058FFCF90666D8A8394703AFCD7A0E:r)

Thank you, Peter>,

Richard W. Walker
Executive Director
Benjamin Rush Institute

BRI is working to change this by educating medical students about positive, proven healthcare policies that preserve and protect the fundamental doctor-patient medical relationship. You can help us bring back the doctor-patient relationship to medicine and eliminate woke culture from medical schools. BRI chapters host meaningful, engaging educational events like lectures, debates, panel discussions, movie screenings, journal clubs, and conferences in medical schools. Our goal is to empower students to stand up against the push for social justice rather than science so we can bring back the doctor/patient relationship. All medical students are enrolled in medical school to care for patients and play a positive role in healthcare and society. But once they graduate from medical school and complete a grueling residency, they become frustrated after finding their work hindered by significant regulatory interference. You and I need to show medical students there is an alternative to socialized, over-regulated healthcare taught in medical schools. It really is up to you and me to improve healthcare affordability, accessibility, and quality. But we'll never achieve those goals unless we restore and protect the fulfilling patient-doctor relationship. The future of medicine - our medical students - must be educated on how today's policies, laws, and regulations will affect the future of medicine and their profession. No public policy issue impacts American lives more profoundly than healthcare. And yet, students rarely learn about healthcare policy in a balanced way. Today's students are presented with solutions permeated by the assumption that government rightly must play a predominant role. But BRI can't do it alone, Peter. Can you send your support by clicking on any link below? Your support has never been more critical to medical education nor vital for BRI to continue thriving. We don't accept ANY government checks, loans, grants, or handouts to avoid entangling alliances. We rely 100% on your support to continue these important programs. You are making a real difference by supporting our student members in the medical field. Thank you, Peter>, Richard W. Walker Executive Director Benjamin Rush Institute richard@benjaminrushinstitute.org (214) 507-4610 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system August 9, 2022. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, A recent Quinnipiac poll showed that nearly half of American families plan to cut back on holiday spending because of inflation and high costs. Is the Biden Administration doing enough? Do they have the right solutions to fix this mess? We have a flash poll ending tonight at midnight that we'd like your answer to below... | | | | Thank you for your time! ~An America United Polling Team | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | | |

body:
Help President Trump FLIP the Senate!
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086956:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)
---
Peter, my name is Alex Mooney, and I'm running for Senate in West Virginia. If you're not familiar with me, please click [**here**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086956:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r) to watch and learn more about my campaign.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086956:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)
---
**[WATCH>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086956:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)**
---
To take back the Senate in 2024, all we need to do is FLIP West Virginia's Senate seat.
---
You'd think this would be easy. In 2020, President Trump carried our great state with nearly 70% of the vote...
---
**_... but Democrat incumbent Joe Manchin has amassed a war chest of nearly $10 MILLION to buy his way back into power like he did in 2018. _**
---
To win this race - and FLIP the Senate - I need support from grassroots conservatives so I can level the playing field against Manchin's millions. It's as simple as that.
---
**Peter, our team has identified YOU as one of the top 10,000 America First patriots in the entire country, so I 'm extending you an exclusive special offer. **
---
_If you step up and contribute in the next hour to help us win this critical race, President Trump 's biggest allies will ensure your gift has the maximum match we can offer _**_ - 1500%!_**_ _
---
**[Please make a 1500% impact contribution of $25, $45, or even $100 to help me FIRE Joe Manchin and win the ONE SEAT we need to FLIP the Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086956:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086956:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)
---
**[_CONTRIBUTE $25 >> $400 IMPACT_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086957:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)**
---
**[_CONTRIBUTE $45 >> $720 IMPACT_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086958:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)**
---
**[_CONTRIBUTE $100 >> $1,600 IMPACT_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086959:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)**
---
**[_CONTRIBUTE $250 >> $4,000 IMPACT_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086960:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)**
---
**[_CONTRIBUTE $500 >> $8,000 IMPACT_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086961:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)**
---
**[_CONTRIBUTE OTHER_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086956:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)**
---
I know it might seem too early to start worrying about 2024.
---
**But the unfortunate reality is that conservatives need to start fundraising NOW if we want to close the gap on well-funded liberal incumbents like Manchin.**
---
You see, unlike Manchin, our campaign isn't being bankrolled by liberal special interest groups, PACs, and the Democrats' DSCC megadonors.
---
_We depend on your grassroots contributions._
---
_Peter, your hard work is the reason we just took back the House, and your support will be the reason we take back the Senate and the White House in 2024._
---
It's not going to be easy, and it's not going to happen overnight, but with patriots like YOU fighting alongside us, there's no doubt that we're going to prevail.
---
**[So please, make a 1500% impact contribution of $20, $45, or even $100 to help me FIRE Joe Manchin and win the ONE SEAT we need to FLIP the Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086956:6OVOCGGAN:m:1:3331421248:A1157859A21EC2730CE210E79704A1B7:r)**

Thank you,

body:
The investments we made this year have made a tremendous difference in electing Democrats. We tripled the amount of money we spent in the 2022 election cycle compared to 2018 -- and it’s all thanks to the grassroots support of folks like you. | |
---
Derek, the investments we made this year have made a tremendous difference in electing Democrats. We tripled the amount of money we spent in the 2022 election cycle compared to 2018 -- and it’s all thanks to the grassroots support of folks like you. Last month, President Biden spoke after Election Day to reiterate his commitment to fighting to deliver for working families -- and about the work we have ahead.
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/GTcSsGdfDWzRRezYN3CORozP_jr698HKZaqLWERuaSMN_IiJpv5C2_pXjrPdu7Cfv9PHQZsd6EPBSBK8mMqW0IzaNVw4BN8TXS4l5uKvmLrKnbJRIUz2S8rCQg9ZnJAQ4G_5NQ_voyDNbFrqVSkbYg4HK28TOKUtWGklc6N7qPgRPuu2-y5Ltf5CI_xy7OjVlWQsVUiEMOuvECVqHkFb6uWUav47i6tF-0Hd2Dfa6boXldCOsX82popiBS4ZSZb9RNvpR6UuRj5u1jH0q7mTomGNGlpNVT1Qv8nWgbLJin4ZQ5tfzBno2IY0OXFv581FrLLLPEnFBSKokqG48cIqDyPrK7P_mxKECyL4fGqEinOliNUMJbm588Ey4_maigfDZlIn3puSxfGNIgwk-Eei7RNdi40LvSVcyGJO3X2mvDk-LaBQfYNTGpNiQblo1I8QdXAWUhKZ63Pe3uxonoKDceKkk6AowloubQIjOdQYKZgPFADtDDXtd3m82V7uWUh3_x9YzE9gun2LmSGM6Bf-auYk6r4r_awR74LFzgkPr9SXC5i99scg7-3cXzs9bINda1FxAdvp7a32EYfOTjhk6OW6EreUrdl-LAwAzC6lAxx18SK9fYVJRhAxCc1-Hw-iGNd0JF0qBq-2TlGiH2Br9glpCNjTmpUqs7jB7kVuY8S66oUcQwkbY5HgVFz57efSLuywcEGh9MenyNE4gGnEgfQOcnmoR009QMKPvILuRjfGS1NgOSwUrg5i423ndiC_fNhE8WTbdb8lnL-pq4KUej7KSCwfXSdp1ZkcTDd8UwWqSQFy8JXVDaRGeX_QyKkt/3s2/LKDXKRlgRwaMqI0Z1mnGOw/h0/d0MndXO1QqPpriu40pbzOuleV72HLb9f5HRX6bGgGVs) |

Americans across the nation answered our call to action by making a grassroots donation to fight for our rights and our democracy.
**Thanks to the support of grassroots activists nationwide, we accomplished so much:**
* We lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic president’s first midterm election in the last 40 years.
* We defended and flipped gubernatorial seats nationwide, our best midterm election for governors since 1986. We also flipped state legislative chambers in places like Michigan.
* We not only _defended_ our Senate majority, we even _flipped_ a seat in Pennsylvania and ensured Sen. Raphael Warnock had the resources to win his runoff in Georgia.

**[We know the holidays are right around the corner, but if you’ve got a little wiggle room in your budget to chip in $7 and help Democrats prepare for 2023, it will go a long way.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ3oDEPNIBpOo7uCgwnD2SG7oQTsrfBePTpoPiouTmSq-yuMvsd5_ZAgDlmrbeXDQ97TQ6iUDrFMB-5TUvAObeCzZs4TO3K6GnZAz4t9Xpg0ceZ5FM33dL4UmIiUWwbsAIvS958IWvpN9Hq_da2Qh0MhxWiHU-h7YZMO_Rlx1LY8-poiybGduKosoPczsu9qbL-ZqG6J0lzLYk6fJxZOrB8u5p6TODF3TvGg5H42FwuKQOksVP22ReiSruRRNQtiivpPd3YvVt86GqGMBYwKQITfS1Uk3E8biRhzVEduFPfQWuvoQ2iiko96p_QXCabzGoVK7ofo-9M9BcGN8ldjoz8tDkCIPooPc5PclEaSZ8Yajcx_c8eLMb35-1vGnBM7MvjsV-BuLia3zNBRRZvpKlb6nSluQvBFEdWAqigtIMFTipOZWLcFb4Eabz78YfSZ3_oE9IYgPhEKXps17l4adEZn-6_-wFHzlNyvByuu03w7Kkm5Jq-45Nk5bi7vUn58luNZEfUta5Ay7K2I9_WhwmyX2i_XuMdR3186075D9cRhP-CW2SteyyDnHSVp1qA_oYisY_lvlYdjDOxZVyflHwusa7jyq1dwcCFj3UC5DagiX4jv-N5akcsgb8pjstjI2q2uSjGKVLJtGCRTaGDYC_-lptY-SWTyI5anfKLEps_8gscKjgzOo5jIgEZ48SJRLN/3s2/LKDXKRlgRwaMqI0Z1mnGOw/h1/jvtDWmMioskDiqeXWO7pEscYB8EZ8ac4XKkDEIs4nac)**

We tripled the amount of money we spent in the 2022 election cycle compared to 2018 -- and it’s all thanks to the grassroots support of folks like you. | | Derek, the investments we made this year have made a tremendous difference in electing Democrats. We tripled the amount of money we spent in the 2022 election cycle compared to 2018 -- and it’s all thanks to the grassroots support of folks like you. Last month, President Biden spoke after Election Day to reiterate his commitment to fighting to deliver for working families -- and about the work we have ahead. | Americans across the nation answered our call to action by making a grassroots donation to fight for our rights and our democracy. Thanks to the support of grassroots activists nationwide, we accomplished so much: We lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic president’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. We defended and flipped gubernatorial seats nationwide, our best midterm election for governors since 1986. We also flipped state legislative chambers in places like Michigan. We not only defended our Senate majority, we even flipped a seat in Pennsylvania and ensured Sen. Raphael Warnock had the resources to win his runoff in Georgia. name: Pramila Jayapal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We can’t allow partisan, hypocritical lawsuits to delay the action that 45 million Americans so desperately need.
#
Peter,
Earlier this week, the student debt crisis reached an astronomical $1,957,848,191,536 — almost 2 trillion dollars.
43 million borrowers are counting on relief through student debt cancellation — but the GOP wants to stop it.
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: if student debt relief helped the ultra-rich, Republicans would have supported it ages ago.
**It’s time for Republicans to drop their hypocritical lawsuits blocking student debt cancellation. 43 million Americans need this relief.[**Can you add your name next to mine on a grassroots petition urging the cancellation of ALL student loan debt?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/student-loan-debt-122022/?source=em20221217-1963&t=1&akid=1963%2E420207%2Ew2nBWo)**
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/student-loan-debt-122022/?source=em20221217-1963&t=2&akid=1963%2E420207%2Ew2nBWo)**
**Peter, one of the plaintiffs suing to stop debt cancellation for 43 million people received relief from a PPP loan worth TWICE the maximum amount covered under the program. The hypocrisy is astounding.
Student debt is crushing millions of Americans. We can’t allow partisan, hypocritical lawsuits to delay relief. Period. [**Peter, if you agree, add your name to our petition today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/student-loan-debt-122022/?source=em20221217-1963&t=3&akid=1963%2E420207%2Ew2nBWo)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/student-loan-debt-122022/?source=em20221217-1963&t=4&akid=1963%2E420207%2Ew2nBWo)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221217-1963-footer&t=5&refcode2=1963_420207_w2nBWo&akid=1963%2E420207%2Ew2nBWo)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=1963%2E420207%2Ew2nBWo)

As state anti-abortion laws define embryos or fetuses as “unborn human beings” this could apply to those created through IVF or other fertility treatments. This would then make it illegal to discard a surplus of embryos. Many new laws on the subject are expected as the new year and a new legislative class comes into office. As of now, a few states are set for this situation. Virginia has pre-filed a bill for the 2023 legislative session that states life begins at fertilization. ---|---|---
### **At war**
The left and right sides of my brain have been at war.
They fight over the question: what am I here for?
Did I come to this world to make beats and kick rhymes,
or was I sent here to fight the signs of our times?
I fought the empire and we drew its blood.
The counterattack, vicious, left me covered in mud,
sweat, tears, tar, feathers, others' projections.
I did everything I could in the realm of elections.
Now I'm selecting a different focus.
A shift within: abandoning hocus pocus.
My self is far more expansive than my voice.
I'm an artist, not just an advocate. That's a choice.
[Listen now * 0:37](https://substack.com/redirect/06ddd714-8b63-4652-ac25-018a54773bf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=91254721&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6OTEyNTQ3MjEsImlhdCI6MTY3MTMwNTgxNywiZXhwIjoxNjczODk3ODE3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.X6sUl5BSrspYjAVSdbaDFUXltFeFS8caMSofmtZj5pQ)
### **At peace**
It's a choice that, in many ways, aims to reclaim agency over my self and my future, while acknowledging the bankruptcy of the political sphere to which I have devoted my life to this point.
Long before organizing direct action to challenge an illegal war, winning a legal battle to stem the tide of money in politics, helping establish marriage equality in the courts, and securing local reforms around the country to restrain police and the surveillance state, I got my earliest taste of struggle at home as an immigrant teen in the Midwest.
Like many immigrant parents, mine were so concerned about my career and financial stability that they discouraged distractions from academics. They saw art, music, and certainly dance as frivolous pursuits that we, as newcomers to the country seeking to establish ourselves, could not afford to indulge.
Many psychologists point to [birth order](https://substack.com/redirect/36d4bc7c-ef87-4ddd-8b4b-988c6a9f6bb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a critical vector informing personality. My inclination towards self-expression may have been encouraged by simply having grown up as the youngest of four children, or perhaps by the culture that influenced me arguably more than my family since I was still a toddler when we came to the States.
With the distance afforded by time, I see now that creative self-expression may have felt like a luxury to them, as people who had traversed the world--twice--simply to find a safe place to live.
Yet, music played a key role in cracking me out of a social shell. Chorus in middle school led to musical theater in high school and college, which in turn helped cultivate a passion for dance that transcended my time on stage. It found fertile ground in 1990s Chicago, where house music also inspired my MCing and spoken word.
By the time I finally took up DJing in the 2010s, I'd finished a decade-long saga for my undergrad degree, earned my law degree from Stanford, taught law as an assistant to a renowned thought leader, completed a litigation career spanning private practice and prolific impact lawsuits in the nation's capital, launched programs for multiple national non-profit organizations, and joined another to lead it.
I'd also released [a debut album](https://substack.com/redirect/90eaa3b6-a3c9-4ab5-a3a8-84b41141ce4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), organized [politicized](https://substack.com/redirect/ca72f27e-743c-4abb-b4c4-b0888fe9218a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [public](https://substack.com/redirect/092ebb19-36b1-4955-bcaa-212e5c078da6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [performance](https://substack.com/redirect/f112c6f8-780e-449e-b3a4-56ff9c1af12b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) collectives on both coasts, and performed around the world, but my work in advocacy almost always (with the prominent exception of the ShantiSalaam tour in 2006-07) gained more of my attention than expressing my creative voice.
That advocacy work had always been driven by my awareness of my (educational, geographic, cultural, and professional) privilege, as well as the intergenerational horror of continuing colonialism that I was generally spared through my family's immigration. I spoke, wrote, organized, litigated, and ran for office because I knew others--not only people around the world, but also my forebears, and whoever in the future manages to survive today's mass extinction crisis and ecocide--lacked my opportunities and desperately needed solidarity.
In some ways, my character assassination in 2020 was the most stressful experience I have ever endured. Beyond racializing me to an even greater extent than the 9/11 attacks and their hateful (continuing) aftermath, it also destroyed my faith in democracy, the press, San Francisco, the future, and the so-called movements that like to call themselves "progressive" and "socialist" while absurdly embodying [the Jim Crow South in California](https://substack.com/redirect/1fb0e572-3a4f-4e1f-a894-ec9fb2c7318a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Time has helped me come to see it, however, as a blessing.
Ending my legal and political career released me to finally go back to my own creative roots. I've been working on setting aside my painful awareness of the past and future to instead focus on the here and now within my reach.
That's much of why I've spent the last six months since the 2022 election DJing in & around San Francisco, producing [new music](https://substack.com/redirect/5f25f3ef-639b-4e59-8b7c-4e027ba1701e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and preparing to launch a new career on which I've recently embarked.
Most of my posts have presented analysis of law & policy topics, primarily in the third-person voice. Going forward, they probably still will since I see through a lot of lies that seem to confuse others and can't keep my mouth shut.
That said, I'd like to start sharing more frequent poetry, and offering my thoughts in other formats (including audio, first-person reports, song lyrics, and perhaps short stories) exploring issues beyond politics, including arts & culture. Would more varied formats and topics interest you more, or less, than essays focused exclusively on politics? I'd welcome your thoughts!
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=91254721&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6OTEyNTQ3MjEsImlhdCI6MTY3MTMwNTgxNywiZXhwIjoxNjczODk3ODE3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.X6sUl5BSrspYjAVSdbaDFUXltFeFS8caMSofmtZj5pQ)
Paid subscribers can access a poem I wrote in Chicago in the early 90s. It captures a similar theme to the one above, while (for me, eerily) foreshadowing my subsequent experience.
