body:
Meanwhile Biden is ignoring the REAL HEALTH THREAT coming through our Southern Border!

[](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/_Sw-HEoXKoJ22d9pF6Nklg~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlgKLWP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMvamsyNjEwY2JhNzFkNy90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC9hMmI4ZjMxZDAxN2Y0M2UyNTkyNzk3NjI0MWNkZjA4NTY0MDQxNDY3VwNzcGNCCmOX1h2eY1EAfZ1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Headline") Peter, Americans cannot afford to let the holiday season go by and ignore the actions of the lame-duck Congress and those of the corrupt man sitting in the Oval Office. While you’re trying to find a way to afford gifts and prepare for holiday events, they are doing all they can to transform this nation into a socialist utopia before the GOP takes the reins in January. The left is using the holiday season to implement a backdoor attempt to force exactly what’s going on in China with their ZERO Covid crackdown, here in the United States. They have the CDC issuing edicts to force our children to have the COVID vaccine like it’s the time-tested ones for polio, measles, mumps, and rubella. It must be stopped now! We must fight like our children’s lives depend on it...because it does. **[Help me show the Deep State that forcing an ineffective and dangerous vaccine on our children is NOT THE ANSWER with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/NN1RFWtEgcuxKNy3at4JBw~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlgKLWP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMvamsyNjEwY2JhNzFkNy90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC8yZWE1ZDczMDIwYjQ0NGY0M2I2YmFmNWE0NDhkY2M4MmRhM2Q5NzA5VwNzcGNCCmOX1h2eY1EAfZ1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Help me show the Deep State that forcing an ineffective and dangerous vaccine on our children is NOT THE ANSWER with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** The crazy logic of Biden and the Left is that they want to force this vaccine that is shown by more and more studies to not even work that well while ignoring the REAL HEALTH THREAT that’s coming through our Southern Border. Despite the growing evidence that the COVID vaccines aren’t even working, the Left wants to force your children to get the COVID shots but will permit undocumented individuals to enter our borders without a proper health screening. Tuberculosis, HIV/AIDS, gonorrhea, congenital syphilis, hepatitis A and B, and other infectious and deadly diseases have been identified in illegal immigrants that are attempting to cross the Southern Border. And those are the ones we caught. Yet the border gates swing wide open as illegals bring these diseases and more into our country with Biden refusing to stop them. **[The answer is clear. We must start protecting our nation and stop the Invasion immediately. Will you chip in $50, $100, or $250 today to help me wage this public health battle to protect our children?](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/CKt9a4ZUQ2sa0j5FMcGo3g~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlgKLWP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMvamsyNjEwY2JhNzFkNy90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC80ZmQxOWMzY2U5MDUxZTY4ZmJmMGE5YzgyODNiM2QxZGRhYWFhMGIxVwNzcGNCCmOX1h2eY1EAfZ1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "The answer is clear. We must start protecting our nation and stop the Invasion immediately. Will you chip in $50, $100, or $250 today to help me wage this public health battle to protect our children?")** Masks, lockdowns, vaccines. None of these worked as promised to stop COVID. But securing our border will. That’s why I am continually fighting for ACTUAL solutions to our countries’ ills. I refuse to compromise my principles and I refuse to see another American child treated like a lab rat. It’s time we empower parents over government bureaucrats. **[Help me continue this fight in Congress with your donation today.](http://go.sparkpostmail2.com/f/a/VW0VmW5mCMgRQmCHdcKuZg~~/AATyWAA~/RgRlgKLWP0SHaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWR0cmF4aW9ubWVkaWEuY29tL2JyZWFkL2luZGV4LnBocC9jYW1wYWlnbnMvamsyNjEwY2JhNzFkNy90cmFjay11cmwvd2E5MjV6bXowNzJhOC81OGVlYTA3ZThkN2JkMzllMTQ1MDlmYWYxODJmNGZlYmFmZjNiYzg3VwNzcGNCCmOX1h2eY1EAfZ1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Help me continue this fight in Congress with your donation today.")** For our children, Andy Biggs
Congressman, Arizona’s 5th District

Despite the growing evidence that the COVID vaccines aren’t even working, the Left wants to force your children to get the COVID shots but will permit undocumented individuals to enter our borders without a proper health screening. Tuberculosis, HIV/AIDS, gonorrhea, congenital syphilis, hepatitis A and B, and other infectious and deadly diseases have been identified in illegal immigrants that are attempting to cross the Southern Border. And those are the ones we caught. Yet the border gates swing wide open as illegals bring these diseases and more into our country with Biden refusing to stop them. "The answer is clear. We must start protecting our nation and stop the Invasion immediately. Will you chip in $50, $100, or $250 today to help me wage this public health battle to protect our children?" Masks, lockdowns, vaccines. None of these worked as promised to stop COVID. But securing our border will. That’s why I am continually fighting for ACTUAL solutions to our countries’ ills. I refuse to compromise my principles and I refuse to see another American child treated like a lab rat. It’s time we empower parents over government bureaucrats. "Help me continue this fight in Congress with your donation today." For our children, Andy Biggs Congressman, Arizona’s 5th District | PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Next Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
On January 3rd, once all of the newly elected and re-elected Members of Congress have been sworn in, Republicans will control the House by a slim majority.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15562%2E3422442%2EBW348E)
Derek, we want to hear from you: **[What should Katie Porter focus on next year?](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-focus-2023/?source=EMAE17_SUR_20221217_V1_F&t=2&akid=15562%2E3422442%2EBW348E)**
**[Take our survey ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-focus-2023/?source=EMAE17_SUR_20221217_V1_F&t=3&akid=15562%2E3422442%2EBW348E)**
On January 3rd, once all of the newly elected and re-elected Members of Congress have been sworn in, Republicans will control the House by a slim majority. **But no matter who controls Congress, Katie will use whatever mechanisms she has to deliver for the people of California and hold special interests accountable.**
Even though we don’t hold the majority, Katie will push Democrats to lead the fight to lower costs for families, strengthen our economy, and protect our fundamental rights.
**[Take our survey ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-focus-2023/?source=EMAE17_SUR_20221217_V1_F&t=4&akid=15562%2E3422442%2EBW348E)**
Thanks for being on Team Porter.

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=5&akid=15562%2E3422442%2EBW348E)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=15562%2E3422442%2EBW348E).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Antisemitism has no place in our communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| Folks, tomorrow is the first night of Hanukkah, and on behalf of my family and our campaign, I would like to extend warm and festive greetings for all those who celebrate.

But I would be remiss if I did not mention a much more serious issue.

**This year, antisemitic violence has risen to the highest levels ever recorded by the Anti-Defamation League.**

Just this past month, antisemitism was given a platform unlike any in recent memory, when former President Trump dined with two of the most vocal and violent antisemites in our country.

Let me be clear, friend: **I won’t stand idly by while antisemitic violence and hate speech is given a platform, then left unchecked by those with the power to condemn it.**

[**So today, I’m hoping you’ll stand with me in condemning antisemitism and hate speech by adding your name to my urgent petition today. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56096385/383856990/981438168?refcode=GLFC_20221217_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU0ODk5Ni00OTdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGbK_6RdgT_Ox5bOczV54avZ30zt-3drfOVigK-0aoo=&emci=856d6f21-6a7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=d5e48996-497e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=10283101) | **[CONDEMN ANTISEMITIC HATE SPEECH& VIOLENCE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56096386/383856991/981438168?refcode=GLFC_20221217_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU0ODk5Ni00OTdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGbK_6RdgT_Ox5bOczV54avZ30zt-3drfOVigK-0aoo=&emci=856d6f21-6a7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=d5e48996-497e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=10283101)**
---
With antisemitic violence and vitriol on the rise, it is up to all of us to call it out whenever and wherever we see it.

**In fact, it is a _moral imperative_ that we must all take responsibility for.**

[**So please, friend, can I count on you to stand with me and add your name to condemn the rise of antisemitism and hate in communities across the country? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56096387/383856992/981438168?refcode=GLFC_20221217_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU0ODk5Ni00OTdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGbK_6RdgT_Ox5bOczV54avZ30zt-3drfOVigK-0aoo=&emci=856d6f21-6a7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=d5e48996-497e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=10283101)
**[CONDEMN ANTISEMITIC HATE SPEECH& VIOLENCE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56096388/383856993/981438168?refcode=GLFC_20221217_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWU0ODk5Ni00OTdlLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGbK_6RdgT_Ox5bOczV54avZ30zt-3drfOVigK-0aoo=&emci=856d6f21-6a7d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=d5e48996-497e-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=10283101)**

In fact, it is a moral imperative that we must all take responsibility for. Thank you, Greg Landsman Congressman-Elect, OH-01 | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 413, Cincinnati, OH 45201 www.landsmanforcongress.com Please, consider making a =. name: Team AOC
subject: Puerto Rico Status Act: Explained!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
In this email, we’ll walk you through some of the contents of the Puerto Rico Status Act.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221217-3718-header&t=1&akid=3718%2E2526796%2EEcuyMr)
Thursday was a historic day:**the Puerto Rico Status Act passed the House**.
For the first time in U.S. history, the House of Representatives has acknowledged that the United States is a colonizing force and that Puerto Rico is, in fact, an extended colony.
In this email, we’ll walk you through some of the bill’s contents. While the bill does not address all critical issues for Puerto Ricans, **it** **plants seeds for the path ahead in the process of decolonization for Puerto Rico.**
Decolonization does not happen with one vote — it is a profound and wide-reaching political, cultural, economic, and psychological endeavor. Alexandria and our team would like to recognize the people of Hawaii, the U.S. Virgin Islands, American Samoa, Guam, and the Northern Mariana Islands, and all indigenous people and descendants of the enslaved.
We stand together ✊🏼
Team AOC
**[CHIP IN $3 TO SUPPORT ALEXANDRIA’S WORK](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221217-3718-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3718%2E2526796%2EEcuyMr)**
| Explainer: Puerto Rico Status Act 🇵🇷
---|---
Puerto Rico’s current status as an _unincorporated territory_ of the U.S. limits the island’s full political, economic, and social development.
### **First, a little background...**
The U.S. has controlled Puerto Rico since 1898, after defeating Spain in the Spanish-American War, but Puerto Ricans did not become American citizens until 1917.
They can be drafted into the military, pay payroll taxes, and help fund programs like Medicaid and SNAP, **but Puerto Ricans are unable to vote for president, do not have a voting representative in Congress, and have almost no access to federal safety net programs, even though more than 40% of the island lives in poverty.**
While many Puerto Ricans agree that they would like more say over the status of the island’s relationship to the U.S., the reality is that _which kind_ of status – whether that’s statehood, independence, or sovereignty in free association with the U.S. – is a controversial topic amongst its residents.
### **That’s where the Puerto Rico Status Act comes in...**
Alexandria has prioritized developing a transparent, inclusive process for Puerto Ricans to choose how to move forward with their relationship to the U.S., which is why she was proud to co-sponsor the Puerto Rico Self-Determination Act alongside Rep. Nydia Velazquez in March 2021. **Key elements of that bill were incorporated into the Puerto Rico Status Act, including** :
👉🏼 **A** **binding** **plebiscite**. Puerto Ricans have voted for changes in status in the past, but all were _non-binding_ _resolutions_ , and saw no real changes to the island’s relationship to the U.S. The PR Status Act would ensure implementation of the status voted on by the majority (51%) of Puerto Rico’s population.
👉🏼 Federally funded, **objective** **educational materials about ALL THREE status options will be shared in advance of the vote** in both Spanish and English, so that Puerto Ricans can fully assess their options for the future.
👉🏼 **Ends the option to continue the island’s current territorial status**. For the first time, Puerto Ricans will choose between three non-territorial status options: statehood, independence, and sovereignty with free association to the U.S.
Other key victories in the bill include protections for Puerto Ricans from being stripped of their U.S. citizenship – no matter the outcome of the vote – and**10 years of financial assistance to the island if it chooses independence**.
### **But this bill is just a first step.**
While the Puerto Rico Status Act does not address other key factors impacting Puerto Ricans' quality of life — including problems with the energy grid, PROMESA, and Act 20 — it does represent a giant step forward for bringing justice to the colonized people of Puerto Rico.
We will stand with the organizers in Puerto Rico as they continue to demand improvements for their community. Pa’lante! **🇵 🇷**
**Alexandria is fighting for a powerful set of policies that will reshape our economy, shrink inequality, and reverse the effects of climate change. And we’re not stopping there — our platform calls for federal limits on rent increases, transformative criminal justice reform, and Medicare for All.**
**Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress.** [If you can, please consider making a donation today to keep Alexandria fighting for our agenda in Congress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221217-3718-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3718%2E2526796%2EEcuyMr)
**[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221217-3718-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3718%2E2526796%2EEcuyMr)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-202212?refcode=em20221217-3718-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=5&refcode2=3718_2526796_EcuyMr&akid=3718%2E2526796%2EEcuyMr)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221217-3718-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=6&akid=3718%2E2526796%2EEcuyMr)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=3718%2E2526796%2EEcuyMr) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=3718%2E2526796%2EEcuyMr) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=3718%2E2526796%2EEcuyMr)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: This is terribly urgent, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | |
**> >> URGENT MESSAGE <<<** We have a crisis on our hands, Peter:

Joe Biden and Secretary Mayorkas are about to let a key border security tool, title 42, EXPIRE...

Immigration is about to SKYROCKET: if Title 42 expires on December 21st, officials are bracing for as many as TENS OF THOUSANDS of illegal crossings per day at the border! ______
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086979:JYidYGGN7:m:1:3331421248:EED33E80482FD413B0F0CDD308B8F00A:r)
---

---
| | [SAVE TITLE 42 >> SECURE THE BORDER](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086979:JYidYGGN7:m:1:3331421248:EED33E80482FD413B0F0CDD308B8F00A:r)
---

This is bad news for America, Peter. But it's not too late.

We are sending this petition to as many conservatives as possible to demand that Joe Biden RENEWS Title 42! We must SECURE THE BORDER NOW.

---
| | [SAVE TITLE 42 >> SECURE THE BORDER](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086979:JYidYGGN7:m:1:3331421248:EED33E80482FD413B0F0CDD308B8F00A:r)
---

We NEED no less than 175,000 signatures by 11:59 PM to prove to the Biden Administration Americans want to SECURE our nation's border, NOT make the crisis worse!

We needed your signature on this yesterday, Peter!!! We're pleading with you, don't delay any longer...

**[Help save our country& sign this urgent Title 42 renewal petition before midnight:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086980:JYidYGGN7:m:1:3331421248:EED33E80482FD413B0F0CDD308B8F00A:r "Help save our
country & sign this urgent Title 42 renewal petition before midnight:")**

---

---

Urgent Border Alerts

---
* * *
---
_We 'll get straight to the point, Peter:

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. **[So, we're humbly asking for $30, $50, $100, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62086981:JYidYGGN7:m:1:3331421248:EED33E80482FD413B0F0CDD308B8F00A:r "So, we’re

subject: Transparency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’re going to be fully transparent with you because we’re accountable to
you as a grassroots organization.

We’ve had a slow but steady decline in our fundraising over the last year.
And since we just launched our 2024 Candidate Recruitment efforts, we
really need to pick up on the pace of our December grassroots fundraising.

It takes a lot of resources, time, and effort to find community leaders
like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman and then work
with their campaigns from the very beginning.

If we don’t see an immediate pickup in our fundraising this month, we’re
going to be faced with some tough choices in January. We’re not the DCCC,
we don’t have tens of millions of dollars in the bank, we don’t take a
dime from corporate PACs or billionaires.

If 10% of people who open this email each donate $3 in
response to this email, then we would be able to catch up on this month’s
fundraising at this critical time.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123454?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20221217-26613&t=1001&akid=26613%2E1203867%2Eopwake ]Will you please donate $3 today to help us continue to
find, recruit, and elect more candidates like AOC? Every donation will
truly make a difference for us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123454?refcode=em20221217-26613&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26613%2E1203867%2Eopwake ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=26613%2E1203867%2Eopwake ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=26613%2E1203867%2Eopwake ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221217-26613-footer&t=1023&refcode2=26613_1203867_opwake&akid=26613%2E1203867%2Eopwake

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=26613%2E1203867%2Eopwake

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
